articles.title: Vertiv 液冷订单 Q2 环比 +58%：AI 数据中心液冷渗透率首次突破 60%
articles.title_en: Vertiv Liquid Cooling Orders Up 58% QoQ: AI Data Center Liquid Cooling Penetration Crosses 60%
articles.summary: Vertiv 7 月 10 日发布 Q2 前瞻数据：液冷相关订单环比增长 58%、同比 +215%，AI 数据中心液冷渗透率首次突破 60%。GB300 与 Rubin 系列的 1500W+ 单卡功耗把风冷方案推向物理边界。
articles.summary_en: Vertiv July 10 preview: liquid cooling orders up 58% QoQ and 215% YoY, AI data center liquid cooling penetration crosses 60% for the first time. GB300 and Rubin's 1500W+ per-card power push air cooling to physical limits.
articles.content:
2026 年 7 月 10 日 Vertiv Holdings 在 Q2 财报前瞻电话会议上公布：Q2 液冷相关订单环比增长 58%、同比增长 215%，AI 数据中心液冷渗透率从 2025 年底的 34% 快速攀升到 2026 年 Q2 的 62%——首次超过 60%。Vertiv 股价盘前 +12%，2026 年年初以来累计涨幅超过 145%。

驱动液冷渗透率跃迁的核心变量是英伟达 Blackwell Ultra（GB300，2026 年 3 月出货）与 Rubin 系列（预计 2027 Q1 出货）——单卡典型功耗从 H100 的 700W 跃升到 GB300 的 1200W、Rubin 首代或将突破 1500W。单机柜功率密度从传统数据中心的 15-25 kW 跃升到 AI 集群的 100-140 kW，风冷方案已经触达物理极限。Vertiv 提供的直冷板（DTC）+ 后门热交换（RDHx）+ 全浸没液冷方案成为微软 Azure、Meta MTIA 集群、CoreWeave、Nebius 的标准配置。

供应链侧的连锁反应：CoolerMaster、Delta、Boyd 三家台系液冷代工订单排到 2027 Q3；SunPower、雅马哈马达尔（Yamaha Motors）等泵阀供应商也进入 AI 数据中心配套名单；国内芯瓴电子、佳力图、朗进科技等液冷方案商 6 月起纷纷进入英伟达合作供应链。Vertiv 与摩根士丹利的行业报告认为——液冷市场规模将从 2025 年的 45 亿美元冲向 2028 年的 250 亿美元。
articles.content_en:
On July 10, 2026, Vertiv Holdings announced during a Q2 pre-earnings call: liquid cooling orders grew 58% QoQ and 215% YoY, with AI data center liquid cooling penetration rising from 34% at end-2025 to 62% in Q2 2026 — crossing 60% for the first time. Vertiv shares rose 12% pre-market, up 145%+ YTD.

The core driver is NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra (GB300, shipping March 2026) and Rubin (expected Q1 2027) — typical per-card power jumping from H100's 700W to GB300's 1200W, with first-gen Rubin projected to exceed 1500W. Per-rack power density has surged from 15-25 kW in traditional data centers to 100-140 kW in AI clusters — air cooling has hit its physical limit. Vertiv's direct-to-chip (DTC) + rear-door heat exchangers (RDHx) + full immersion cooling stack is now standard across Microsoft Azure, Meta MTIA clusters, CoreWeave, and Nebius.

Supply-chain chain reaction: Taiwan cooler ODMs CoolerMaster, Delta, and Boyd have order backlogs into Q3 2027; pump/valve suppliers like SunPower and Yamaha Motors now appear on AI data center BOMs; Chinese vendors XinLing Electronics, Jialitu, and Langjin joined NVIDIA's approved supplier lists in June. Vertiv and Morgan Stanley's industry report projects the liquid cooling market growing from $4.5B in 2025 to $25B by 2028.
key_points: Vertiv Q2 液冷订单环比 +58% 同比 +215%
AI 数据中心液冷渗透率从 34% 升至 62% 首次破 60%
GB300 单卡 1200W Rubin 或突破 1500W 单柜功率 100-140 kW
微软 Meta CoreWeave Nebius 全部切换直冷板 + 浸没液冷
key_points_en: Vertiv Q2 liquid cooling orders up 58 percent QoQ 215 percent YoY
AI data center liquid cooling penetration jumps from 34 to 62 percent
GB300 1200W Rubin 1500W plus per rack 100-140 kW air cooling hits limit
Microsoft Meta CoreWeave Nebius all switched to DTC plus immersion
Liquid cooling market 4.5B in 2025 to 25B by 2028

articles.title: FDA 批准首款 AI 全自主胰岛素调节系统：夜间低血糖事件率下降 87%
articles.title_en: FDA Approves First Fully-Autonomous AI Insulin Regulation System: Nighttime Hypoglycemia Down 87%
articles.summary: 7 月 10 日 FDA 授予 Insulet + Medtronic 联合开发的 AutoPod X 系统 De Novo 认证——首个完全无需人工干预的 AI 胰岛素调节闭环，III 期临床显示夜间低血糖事件率下降 87%。
articles.summary_en: On July 10, the FDA granted De Novo authorization to AutoPod X — a joint Insulet/Medtronic system and the first fully-autonomous AI-driven closed-loop insulin regulator. Phase III trials show 87% reduction in nighttime hypoglycemia events.
articles.content:
2026 年 7 月 10 日 FDA 通过 De Novo 认证路径批准了 Insulet 与 Medtronic 联合开发的 AutoPod X 系统上市——业内首个「完全无需用户干预」的 AI 全自主胰岛素调节闭环。系统由 CGM（连续血糖监测传感器）+ 胰岛素泵 + 边端 AI 模型（Insulet 自研 100M 参数模型 InsuNet-3）组成——AI 每 5 分钟做一次血糖预测与胰岛素剂量决策，用户可以在完全「无操作」状态下渡过一整夜甚至一整天。

III 期临床数据（1200 例 1 型糖尿病患者、随访 12 个月）：夜间低血糖事件率下降 87%（对照组 8.6 次/月 vs 试验组 1.1 次/月）；HbA1c 平均降低 0.94 个百分点；每日血糖时间在目标范围内（TIR）从对照组 62% 提升到 81%。1 型糖尿病人的核心焦虑——夜间低血糖导致的睡眠中意外——第一次被 AI 显著缓解。

AutoPod X 的商业化路径已经明确：Insulet 与 Medtronic 计划 2026 年 Q4 在美国 500 家医院启动商业化，单套系统年度使用费用 8500 美元（Medicare + 商保覆盖后患者自付约 2000 美元/年）。这是继 2024 年 GLP-1 类药物之后，糖尿病管理领域的又一次结构性技术升级。全球 5.4 亿糖尿病患者的市场，AI 医疗从「辅助诊断」正式跨入「全自主治疗」阶段。
articles.content_en:
On July 10, 2026, the FDA granted De Novo authorization to AutoPod X, jointly developed by Insulet and Medtronic — the industry's first 'fully user-hands-off' AI-driven closed-loop insulin regulator. The system combines a CGM (continuous glucose monitor) + insulin pump + edge AI model (Insulet's 100M-param proprietary InsuNet-3) — the AI makes glucose prediction and insulin dosing decisions every 5 minutes, allowing users to pass through an entire night, or even a full day, with zero intervention.

Phase III trial data (1,200 Type 1 diabetics, 12-month follow-up): nighttime hypoglycemia events down 87% (control group 8.6/month vs. treatment group 1.1/month); average HbA1c reduction of 0.94 percentage points; time-in-range (TIR) improved from 62% to 81%. The core anxiety of Type 1 diabetics — nighttime hypoglycemia during sleep — has been significantly alleviated by AI for the first time.

AutoPod X's commercial rollout is defined: Insulet and Medtronic plan to launch in 500 US hospitals in Q4 2026, with annual system usage fees of $8,500 (Medicare + commercial insurance leaves patients paying ~$2,000/year out-of-pocket). Following GLP-1s in 2024, this marks another structural upgrade in diabetes management. Across the 540M global diabetic market, AI medicine formally moves from 'diagnosis assistance' to 'fully autonomous treatment.'
key_points: FDA 批准 AutoPod X 首个 AI 全自主胰岛素调节闭环
夜间低血糖事件率下降 87% HbA1c 平均降 0.94 百分点
TIR 从 62% 提升到 81% 患者可整夜无操作
边端 100M 参数 AI 模型 InsuNet-3 每 5 分钟决策一次
Q4 500 家医院商业化 全球 5.4 亿糖尿病市场
key_points_en: FDA approves AutoPod X first AI fully autonomous insulin closed loop
Nighttime hypoglycemia down 87 percent HbA1c reduced 0.94 points
TIR from 62 to 81 percent patients can sleep hands off
Edge 100M param AI InsuNet-3 makes decisions every 5 minutes
Q4 500 US hospitals launch 540M global diabetic market

articles.title: Figure 03 首批 2000 台量产交付宝马工厂：单台售价降至 39900 美元
articles.title_en: Figure 03 First 2000 Units Ship to BMW: Per-Unit Price Drops to $39,900
articles.summary: Figure AI 7 月 10 日公告：Figure 03 首批 2000 台已完成交付宝马斯巴坦堡工厂，单台标准售价从 Figure 02 的 65000 美元降至 39900 美元。宝马 CEO 齐普策亲赴现场并宣布 2027 年将扩容至 10000 台部署。
articles.summary_en: Figure AI announced July 10: 2,000 Figure 03 units have shipped to BMW's Spartanburg plant, with unit price cut from Figure 02's $65,000 to $39,900. BMW CEO Zipse attended and announced expansion to 10,000 units by 2027.
articles.content:
2026 年 7 月 10 日 Figure AI 官方公告：Figure 03 首批 2000 台人形机器人已经完成向宝马集团斯巴坦堡工厂（南卡罗来纳州）的交付——这是全球首次单批 2000 台级别的通用人形机器人商业化部署。Figure 03 相比 Figure 02 有三大跃升：单台标准售价从 65000 美元降至 39900 美元（降幅 38.6%）、自主任务完成率从 68% 提升到 89%、单机日均连续工作时长从 8 小时延长至 16 小时。

宝马斯巴坦堡工厂的实际部署场景：车身分拣（占 42%）、螺栓预装（27%）、内饰件运输（18%）、质检抽样（13%）。宝马 CEO Oliver Zipse 亲赴现场，宣布 2027 年将 Figure 03 部署规模从当前的 2000 台扩展到 10000 台——覆盖宝马全球 15 家整车工厂的 60% 装配工位。宝马集团研发副总裁 Frank Weber 指出「Figure 03 的边际成本降低已经与蓝领工人的三年 TCO 拉平」。

更值得关注的是价格拐点。Figure 02 售价 65000 美元时的部署量约 400 台/年，Figure 03 降至 39900 美元后订单已超 12000 台——单价下降 40% 触发订单量增长 30 倍，说明通用人形机器人首次跨越了「TCO 平价拐点」。Figure 与摩根士丹利 6 月发布的白皮书预测——2028 年全球通用人形机器人年出货量将从 2026 年的 4 万台冲向 100 万台。
articles.content_en:
Figure AI announced on July 10, 2026: the first 2,000 Figure 03 humanoid robots have been delivered to BMW's Spartanburg plant (South Carolina) — the world's first 2000-unit batch commercial deployment of general-purpose humanoid robots. Figure 03 offers three leaps over Figure 02: unit price cut from $65,000 to $39,900 (down 38.6%), autonomous task completion rate up from 68% to 89%, and per-unit continuous work time extended from 8 hours to 16 hours.

Actual deployment scenarios at BMW Spartanburg: body sorting (42%), bolt pre-assembly (27%), interior parts transport (18%), and QC sampling (13%). BMW CEO Oliver Zipse attended personally and announced expanding Figure 03 deployment from 2,000 to 10,000 units by 2027 — covering 60% of assembly stations across BMW's 15 global vehicle plants. BMW R&D VP Frank Weber noted 'Figure 03's marginal cost has reached parity with a blue-collar worker's 3-year TCO.'

The price inflection is even more significant. Figure 02 at $65,000 shipped ~400 units/year; Figure 03 at $39,900 has already booked 12,000+ orders — a 40% price drop triggering 30x order volume growth, confirming that general-purpose humanoids have crossed the 'TCO parity inflection point.' Figure and Morgan Stanley's June white paper projects global general-purpose humanoid shipments growing from 40,000 in 2026 to 1,000,000 by 2028.
key_points: Figure 03 首批 2000 台交付宝马斯巴坦堡工厂
单台售价从 65000 降至 39900 美元 降幅 38.6%
自主任务完成率 68% → 89% 单机工作时长 8h → 16h
宝马 2027 年扩容至 10000 台覆盖 60% 装配工位
订单量 30 倍增长 触发通用人形机器人 TCO 平价拐点
key_points_en: Figure 03 first 2000 units delivered to BMW Spartanburg plant
Unit price down from 65K to 39.9K dollars 38.6 percent cut
Autonomous task completion from 68 to 89 percent runtime 8 to 16 hours
BMW to expand to 10000 units by 2027 covering 60 percent assembly stations
30x order growth confirms humanoid TCO parity inflection reached

articles.title: 欧盟 AI Act 第二阶段落地：GPT-5.6、Claude Fable 5、Gemini 3、DeepSeek V4、GLM 5.2 五模型被列入系统性风险名单
articles.title_en: EU AI Act Phase 2 Live: GPT-5.6, Claude Fable 5, Gemini 3, DeepSeek V4, GLM 5.2 Listed as Systemic Risk
articles.summary: 欧盟 AI 办公室 7 月 10 日公布首份「通用大模型系统性风险」清单：GPT-5.6、Claude Fable 5、Gemini 3、DeepSeek V4、GLM 5.2 五款模型入选。上榜模型需在 60 天内完成能力评估、红队测试、系统卡透明化。
articles.summary_en: The EU AI Office on July 10 published the first 'GPAI systemic risk' list: GPT-5.6, Claude Fable 5, Gemini 3, DeepSeek V4, and GLM 5.2 selected. Listed models must complete capability evaluation, red-team testing, and system card disclosure within 60 days.
articles.content:
2026 年 7 月 10 日欧盟 AI 办公室在布鲁塞尔正式公布《通用大模型（GPAI）系统性风险认定名单第一批》——GPT-5.6（OpenAI）、Claude Fable 5（Anthropic）、Gemini 3（Google DeepMind）、DeepSeek V4（DeepSeek AI）、GLM 5.2（智谱 AI）五款模型入选。这是欧盟 AI Act 于 2024 年 8 月生效以来首次公布具体名单，标志着 AI Act 第二阶段（GPAI 义务条款）正式进入执行。

上榜模型的合规义务涵盖 4 项：其一，60 天内向欧盟 AI 办公室提交完整能力评估报告（含 dangerous capabilities 测试）；其二，第三方红队测试（Frontier Model Forum 认证团队）；其三，系统卡（System Card）披露训练数据来源、算力预算、对齐方法；其四，网络安全事件通报机制（24 小时报告制）。任何未在 2026 年 9 月 10 日前完成 4 项义务的模型将被暂停在欧盟境内提供服务。

合规压力最大的是 DeepSeek V4 与 GLM 5.2 两款中国模型——它们的训练算力预算、数据来源披露程度低于美国三家，Frontier Model Forum 尚未接纳这两家为成员。欧盟态度是「合规就正常运营，不合规就退出欧盟市场」，DeepSeek 与智谱正在紧急筹备合规团队。7 月 10 日下午 OpenAI 已官宣「4 项义务将在 8 月 20 日前全部提交」——率先示范。这份「五模型清单」的隐含意义是——AI 治理从口号进入了具体的名单与时间表。
articles.content_en:
On July 10, 2026, the EU AI Office in Brussels officially released the 'First List of GPAI (General-Purpose AI) Systemic Risk Determination' — GPT-5.6 (OpenAI), Claude Fable 5 (Anthropic), Gemini 3 (Google DeepMind), DeepSeek V4 (DeepSeek AI), and GLM 5.2 (Zhipu AI). This is the first specific list since the EU AI Act took effect in August 2024, marking Phase 2 (GPAI obligations) entering enforcement.

Listed models must fulfill four obligations: first, submit a complete capability evaluation report (including dangerous capabilities testing) to the EU AI Office within 60 days; second, undergo third-party red-team testing (by Frontier Model Forum certified teams); third, disclose System Cards including training data sources, compute budget, and alignment methods; fourth, activate a cybersecurity incident notification mechanism (24-hour reporting). Any model failing to complete these four obligations by September 10, 2026 will be suspended from EU markets.

The highest compliance pressure falls on DeepSeek V4 and GLM 5.2 — their training compute disclosure and data source transparency lag behind the three US models, and neither has joined Frontier Model Forum. EU stance: 'comply and operate normally; non-compliance means exit the EU market.' DeepSeek and Zhipu are urgently assembling compliance teams. On July 10 afternoon, OpenAI already announced 'all four obligations will be submitted before August 20' — leading by example. The implicit meaning of this five-model list: AI governance has moved from slogans to specific names and deadlines.

articles.title: Anthropic 完成 60 亿美元 G 轮融资：估值 4000 亿美元，Google + Amazon 联合领投
articles.title_en: Anthropic Closes $6B Series G at $400B Valuation: Google + Amazon Co-Lead
articles.summary: Anthropic 7 月 10 日官宣完成 60 亿美元 G 轮融资、投后估值 4000 亿美元——较 2 月 1830 亿估值 5 个月翻 2.2 倍，Google + Amazon 联合领投，主权财富基金 GIC、Temasek 首次入股。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic announced July 10 a $6B Series G at a $400B post-money valuation — 2.2x higher than its $183B in February. Google and Amazon co-led; sovereign wealth funds GIC and Temasek entered for the first time.
articles.content:
2026 年 7 月 10 日 Anthropic 官方宣布完成 60 亿美元 G 轮融资、投后估值 4000 亿美元——较 2 月披露的 1830 亿美元估值 5 个月翻 2.2 倍，成为 2026 年至今全球最大单笔风险投资交易。领投阵容极其强势：Google（追加 20 亿美元）+ Amazon（追加 15 亿美元）+ 新加坡主权基金 GIC（10 亿美元、首次入股）+ 淡马锡 Temasek（5 亿美元、首次入股）+ Fidelity + Baillie Gifford + Coatue 跟投。

本次融资的核心用途分三条：其一，加强算力基础设施建设——Anthropic 目前每月向 Amazon AWS 与 Google Cloud 支付 12.5 亿美元租算力费，本轮融资将支持 Project Rainier 二期扩建（AWS Trainium2 集群从当前 40 万卡扩至 100 万卡）；其二，加速 Claude Fable 5.1 与 Fable 6 研发（原计划 2027 Q1 发布的 Fable 6 提前至 2026 Q4）；其三，招募 500 名研究人员（此前 OpenAI 离职四位核心研究员中一位已确认加入 Anthropic）。

Google + Amazon 双巨头共同领投的信号意义远超财务本身——这是自 2023 年 Amazon 承诺 40 亿美元投资 Anthropic 以来第一次，两家最大云厂在同一轮合流。业内解读：Google 用投资锁定 Anthropic 的 TPU 采购优先权，Amazon 巩固 Trainium 独家训练伙伴关系——AI 大模型公司的「云绑定」进入决定性阶段。Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 在公告中强调「本轮资金将支持 Anthropic 通往 AGI 的最后一段路」。
articles.content_en:
Anthropic officially announced on July 10, 2026 the close of a $6B Series G at a $400B post-money valuation — 2.2x higher than the $183B disclosed in February, making this the largest single venture financing globally in 2026. Lead lineup is extremely strong: Google (+$2B), Amazon (+$1.5B), Singapore sovereign fund GIC ($1B, first-time investor), Temasek ($500M, first-time investor), plus Fidelity, Baillie Gifford, and Coatue.

Use of funds falls into three buckets: first, compute infrastructure — Anthropic currently pays $1.25B/month to AWS and Google Cloud for compute; this round will fund Project Rainier Phase 2 (AWS Trainium2 cluster expansion from 400K cards today to 1M cards); second, accelerate Claude Fable 5.1 and Fable 6 R&D (Fable 6, originally scheduled for Q1 2027, now moved forward to Q4 2026); third, recruit 500 researchers (one of the four OpenAI defectors this week has been confirmed to have joined Anthropic).

Google + Amazon dual-lead investment signals far more than financial commitment — it's the first time since Amazon's 2023 $4B pledge that the two largest cloud providers co-lead a single round. Industry read: Google secures TPU purchase priority, Amazon locks Trainium exclusive training partnership — AI foundation-model 'cloud binding' enters decisive phase. Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei stated 'this round funds Anthropic's final push toward AGI.'

hero.title: Agent 商业化的拐点：Cursor 40 亿 / Cognition 8 亿 / Lindy 15 亿——90 天 ARR 集体撞线的产业裂变
hero.title_en: The Agent Commercialization Inflection Point: Cursor $4B / Cognition $800M / Lindy $150M — 90 Days of ARR Convergence Reshapes the Industry
hero.summary: 2026 年 7 月 10 日 The Information / Bloomberg / TechCrunch 三家同日披露：Cursor 年化 ARR 40 亿美元、Cognition Devin 8 亿美元、Lindy 15 亿——三家 Agent 头部公司在 90 天内集体撞线 10 亿门槛。Agent 从「Demo 秀」变成「账单表」的关键 90 天，同期 GPT-5.6 / Claude Fable 5 / GLM 5.2 底层模型分层与 Kimi K3 开源冲击，共同标记出 AI Agent 商业化的第一个真正拐点。本文从事实核对、Cursor 40 亿人效经济学、Cognition Devin 生产化突破、Lindy 客服 Agent 横切逻辑、底层模型分层、Agent 单价定价时代、AI 投资地图第四次重塑、Agent 时代垂直 Know-How 门票 8 个维度深度拆解。
hero.summary_en: On July 10, 2026, The Information / Bloomberg / TechCrunch simultaneously disclosed: Cursor's annualized ARR hit $4B, Cognition Devin $800M, Lindy $150M — three Agent leaders crossed the $1B threshold within a 90-day window. Agent went from 'Demo Show' to 'Invoice Sheet' in these 90 days, alongside GPT-5.6 / Claude Fable 5 / GLM 5.2 model layering and Kimi K3's open-source shock — together marking the first true inflection point of AI Agent commercialization. This article dissects the moment across 8 dimensions: fact-check, Cursor $4B revenue-per-employee economics, Cognition Devin production breakthrough, Lindy's customer-service horizontal logic, foundation model layering, Agent per-unit pricing era, the fourth AI investment map reshaping, and the vertical Know-How ticket to the Agent era.

hero.title: 全球 AI 三巨头开闸日：GPT-5.6 全网开放、Grok 4.5 面向公众、DeepSeek 与智谱双双秘密造芯
hero.title_en: Global AI Floodgates Day: GPT-5.6 Goes Worldwide, Grok 4.5 Opens to Public, DeepSeek & Zhipu Both Secretly Building Chips
hero.summary: 2026 年 7 月 9 日是全球 AI 产业分水岭：一边是 OpenAI GPT-5.6 完成商务部 CAISI 批复正式全球开放 Sol / Terra / Luna 三档、Grok 4.5 面向公众开闸并与 Cursor 联合训练成为首个编程 Agent 专用模型，另一边是路透社与 The Information 同日曝出 DeepSeek 秘密启动推理芯片项目一年、智谱 GLM-5.2 上线首周日 token +27 倍触发自研 ASIC——同一天英伟达 5/14 高点回撤 16%、市值蒸发约 1 万亿美元、前瞻 PE 跌至 18 倍七年新低。CNBC 与 OpenRouter 同期披露：中国开源模型在美国 API 市场周占比自 2/8 起稳定 30% 以上、峰值触 46%，Coinbase、Airbnb、Lindy 集体切换。软件端「去英伟达化」与硬件端「去英伟达化」同时启动，全球 AI 算力生态迎来结构性裂变。
hero.summary_en: July 9, 2026 marks a watershed for global AI: on one side, OpenAI GPT-5.6 clears CAISI review to go worldwide across Sol / Terra / Luna tiers while Grok 4.5 opens to the public and, co-trained with Cursor, becomes the first coding-agent-focused frontier model; on the other side, Reuters and The Information simultaneously reveal that DeepSeek has been quietly building an inference chip for a year and Zhipu—after GLM-5.2 saw a 27x daily token surge in its first week on Vercel—has started its own ASIC. On the same day Nvidia is down 16% from its May 14 peak, roughly USD 1 trillion in market cap gone and its forward PE at a seven-year low of 18. CNBC and OpenRouter report that Chinese open models have held a 30%+ share of the US API market since Feb 8, peaking at 46%—with Coinbase, Airbnb, and Lindy all switching. Software-side and hardware-side «de-Nvidiafication» begin on the same day, and the global AI compute ecosystem enters a structural fracture.

articles.title: GPT-5.6 全球开闸：Sol / Terra / Luna 三档正式开放，Terminal-Bench 88.8 分击穿 Claude Mythos 5
articles.title_en: GPT-5.6 Goes Worldwide: Sol / Terra / Luna Officially Live, Terminal-Bench 88.8 Beats Claude Mythos 5
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 9 日 OpenAI GPT-5.6 三档模型 Sol、Terra、Luna 完成美国商务部 CAISI（人工智能安全与创新中心）安全审查批复，正式面向全球商业化开放。Sol 输入 5 美元 / M tokens、输出 30 美元 / M tokens，约为 Claude Fable 5 一半；上下文从 100 万扩展至 150 万 tokens（+43%）；Terminal-Bench 2.1 Sol 88.8 分、Ultra 91.9 分，击败 Claude Mythos 5 的 88.0；同时宣布将部署 Cerebras WSE-3 芯片做推理加速，是 OpenAI 首次公开引入非英伟达算力。全球开放让 OpenAI 单季度 API 收入预期上调至 240 亿美元。
articles.summary_en: On July 9, 2026 OpenAI's GPT-5.6 tier trio—Sol, Terra, Luna—cleared the US Commerce Department's CAISI safety review and went commercially live worldwide. Sol lists at USD 5 / M input tokens and USD 30 / M output, roughly half of Claude Fable 5; the context window jumps from 1M to 1.5M tokens (+43%); Terminal-Bench 2.1 shows Sol at 88.8 and Ultra at 91.9, beating Claude Mythos 5's 88.0. OpenAI also announced Cerebras WSE-3 deployment for inference acceleration—the first non-Nvidia compute officially adopted by OpenAI. The global launch pushes single-quarter API revenue guidance to USD 24 billion.
articles.content: GPT-5.6 三档全球开闸的核心不是模型能力再突破，而是「定价 + 硬件 + 上下文」的三重范式转换。定价上 Sol 单价约为 Claude Fable 5 的一半，Terra 用约 1/3 的 Token 数达到同水平任务效果——TCO 事实上比 Anthropic 领先 60%+；硬件上首次官宣 Cerebras WSE-3 部署推理，标志 OpenAI 主动为「非英伟达」算力打开门；上下文 150 万 tokens 让「一次性喂完 500 页 PDF + 100 万行代码」成为常态，Cursor / Windsurf 等 Agent 前端的默认模型可能重排。开放窗口选在周四不是巧合——避开美股周一压力、留出周末给用户上手；CAISI 批复走完是 6 月 26 日 EO 14232 生效后首个案例，成为「AI 出口管制 + 安全审查」双轨制的实操样本。全球开放预计让 OpenAI 单季度 API 收入从 190 亿美元跃升至 240 亿美元，直接把 OpenAI 拉入 1000 亿美元年收入门槛。
articles.content_en: The core of the GPT-5.6 tiered launch isn't a new capability leap, but a triple paradigm shift across pricing, hardware, and context. On pricing, Sol is about half the price of Claude Fable 5, and Terra hits equivalent task quality with ~1/3 the tokens—giving OpenAI a 60%+ TCO edge over Anthropic. On hardware, the first announced Cerebras WSE-3 deployment signals OpenAI's willingness to open the «non-Nvidia» door. Context expansion to 1.5M tokens makes «feeding 500-page PDFs and 1M lines of code in one shot» routine, and Cursor / Windsurf default models may reshuffle. Thursday launch isn't accidental—it avoids Monday US market pressure and gives users the weekend to onboard; the CAISI clearance is the first case under EO 14232 (effective June 26), a live template for the «export-control + safety-review» dual-track. Global rollout pushes single-quarter API revenue guidance from USD 19B to USD 24B, putting OpenAI on the doorstep of a USD 100B annual run rate.

articles.title: Grok 4.5 面向公众开放：SpaceXAI 与 Cursor 联合训练，首个编程 Agent 专用模型
articles.title_en: Grok 4.5 Opens to Public: SpaceXAI x Cursor Jointly Trained, First Coding-Agent Frontier Model
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 9 日 SpaceXAI 宣布 Grok 4.5 正式面向公众开放，X Premium 与开发者 API 双通道上线。这是全球第一个「编程 / Agent 专用」旗舰模型——训练阶段与 Cursor 团队直接合作，用 Cursor 内部 100 万开发者的匿名代码流数据做 RLHF，Opus 级性能同时速度更快、token 效率更高、成本更低。与 4 月 Grok 4.0 相比，SWE-bench Verified 从 71.3 提升至 79.4；单次 Agent 任务平均消耗从 12 万 tokens 降至 7.8 万，节省 35%。Cursor 联合创始人 Michael Truell 表示 Grok 4.5 将成为 Cursor 默认 Agent 模型。
articles.summary_en: On July 9, 2026 SpaceXAI opened Grok 4.5 to the public via X Premium and developer API. It is the world's first coding-agent-focused frontier model—jointly trained with Cursor's team using anonymized code streams from Cursor's 1M active developers for RLHF, achieving Opus-class quality at higher speed, better token efficiency, and lower cost. Versus April's Grok 4.0, SWE-bench Verified rises from 71.3 to 79.4, and average tokens per agent task drop from 120k to 78k (-35%). Cursor co-founder Michael Truell confirmed Grok 4.5 will become the default agent model in Cursor.
articles.source_en: IT Home 2026-07-09 / STAR Daily 2026-07-09 / Weibo @SpaceXAI 2026-07-09 / X @Cursor 2026-07-09
articles.content: Grok 4.5 与 Cursor 联合训练是「模型 - 应用」共研的第一个公开样本。传统模型上线后再由应用层做 fine-tune / prompt 工程，Cursor 则直接把 IDE 层的匿名交互数据（编辑 → 运行 → 修复 → 提交）作为 RLHF 信号回流到 SpaceXAI 训练管线，让 Grok 4.5 在「多轮编辑 - 定位 - 修复」任务上有显著优势。SWE-bench Verified 79.4 超过 Claude Mythos 5 的 78.5、逼近 GPT-5.6 Ultra 的 80.1，成为全球第三家越过 79 分门槛的模型。真正的杀手锏是 Token 效率——Agent 任务 tokens/次从 12 万降至 7.8 万，单次任务成本从 4.8 美元降至 2.6 美元。对 Cursor 20 美元 / 月订阅商业模式而言，毛利率直接从 -8% 拉回 +21%。Elon Musk 在 X 上发文称「这是 xAI 第一次交付『能干活的』模型」——从竞赛型走向工程型的分水岭。
articles.content_en: Grok 4.5's Cursor co-training is the first public case of «model-application» co-development. Traditional flow lets apps fine-tune / prompt after model release; Cursor instead pipes anonymized IDE-level interactions (edit → run → fix → commit) directly into xAI's RLHF pipeline, giving Grok 4.5 an edge on multi-turn edit-locate-fix tasks. SWE-bench Verified at 79.4 beats Claude Mythos 5 at 78.5 and closes on GPT-5.6 Ultra at 80.1—the third model to cross the 79 line. The real killer app is token efficiency—agent task tokens drop from 120k to 78k, per-task cost from USD 4.80 to USD 2.60. For Cursor's USD 20/mo subscription, gross margin swings from -8% to +21%. Elon Musk tweeted this is «xAI's first model that actually gets work done»—the pivot from benchmark model to production model.

与 Cursor 联合训练，用 100 万开发者匿名代码流做 RLHF

articles.title: 路透独家：DeepSeek 秘密启动推理芯片项目一年，剑指英伟达 H20 后替代
articles.title_en: Reuters Exclusive: DeepSeek Has Been Quietly Building an Inference Chip for a Year
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 7 日路透社独家披露，DeepSeek 内部一年前秘密启动自研推理芯片项目，聚焦推理而非训练，已与国内多家芯片设计公司、晶圆代工厂、HBM 存储厂建立技术对接。三位独立信源确认项目存在，目标是把 DeepSeek 自身推理成本再压缩 30-50%、并降低对英伟达 H800 / H20 及昇腾 910C 的依赖。DeepSeek 于 2026 年 6 月完成 510 亿元人民币融资（估值 520-590 亿美元），部分资金将投入芯片研发。业内估计从流片到量产需 18-24 个月，主要挑战集中在制程、HBM 供货、软件栈与流片资金。
articles.summary_en: On July 7, 2026 Reuters exclusively reported that DeepSeek has been quietly building an inference-focused chip for a year, engaging domestic chip design houses, foundries, and HBM suppliers. Three independent sources confirm the project. The goal is to cut DeepSeek's own inference cost by another 30-50% and reduce dependence on Nvidia H800 / H20 and Huawei Ascend 910C. DeepSeek closed a RMB 51B round in June 2026 (valuation USD 52-59B), part of which is earmarked for silicon R&D. Industry estimates put tape-out to mass production at 18-24 months, with process node, HBM supply, software stack, and tape-out cash flagged as the main hurdles.
articles.source_en: Reuters 2026-07-07 / Guancha 2026-07-08 / 36Kr 2026-07-08 / NetEase Tech 2026-07-08 / All-Weather Tech 2026-07-08
articles.content: DeepSeek 造芯是继阿里平头哥、字节 Seed 芯片项目之后，中国头部大模型公司第三家公开进入自研 ASIC 赛道。项目聚焦推理端而非训练——训练用英伟达 H100 / H800、推理用自研芯片，是全球头部大模型公司的通用范式（谷歌 TPU、亚马逊 Trainium/Inferentia、Meta MTIA 同路径）。DeepSeek 之所以选这一时点，两条内因加一条外因共同推动：内因一是 DeepSeek R2 / V4 推理调用量在 2026 年 Q2 已经追平 OpenAI 全网调用量的 65%，仅推理算力年租金已超 30 亿美元；内因二是 6 月 510 亿人民币融资到账后，账上现金能覆盖首次流片的 3-5 亿美元资金门槛。外因是 6 月 26 日 EO 14232 生效后美国对华芯片管制再度收紧，H20 出口窗口不确定性上升。产业界普遍预期首次流片在 12 个月内完成、量产在 2028 年 Q2 前后，直接影响将是英伟达在推理侧订单份额被逐步分流。
articles.content_en: DeepSeek's chip project makes it the third major Chinese foundation model company to enter custom-ASIC territory, after Alibaba's T-Head and ByteDance's Seed silicon effort. Focus is inference—training on Nvidia H100/H800, inference on custom silicon—which mirrors Google TPU, Amazon Trainium/Inferentia, and Meta MTIA. Two internal drivers plus one external trigger converge: (1) DeepSeek R2 / V4 inference volume hit ~65% of OpenAI's total requests in Q2 2026, with inference lease costs already above USD 3B/year; (2) with the USD 7B June round on the balance sheet, DeepSeek can now clear the USD 300-500M tape-out threshold; (3) EO 14232 taking effect June 26 has re-tightened US-China chip export controls, raising H20 supply uncertainty. Industry expects first tape-out within 12 months, mass production around Q2 2028, and gradual erosion of Nvidia's inference-side share.
key_points: 路透独家：项目启动一年，专注推理端

目标推理成本再降 30-50%，降低对 H800 / 昇腾依赖

articles.title: The Information：智谱同步启动自研 AI 芯片，GLM-5.2 首周日 token +27 倍触发决策
articles.title_en: The Information: Zhipu Also Starts Its Own AI Chip, After GLM-5.2's 27x Token Surge in Week One
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 7 日 The Information 独家报道，智谱 AI 已启动自研 AI 芯片项目，走 ASIC 路线专攻推理。触发点是上月底发布的 GLM-5.2：Vercel 数据显示 GLM-5.2 首周日 token 消耗量暴涨 27 倍、客户数 +80 倍；OpenRouter 数据显示 GLM-5.2 在美国 API 市场的调用量跃升至前 5。用量爆发让智谱推理算力压力骤增。智谱已经与国内多家芯片设计企业初步磋商，项目周期或超两年。这是 DeepSeek 曝光造芯同一天出现的第二起同类消息——头部大模型公司「自建推理算力」的产业共识形成。
articles.summary_en: On July 7, 2026 The Information exclusively reported that Zhipu AI has kicked off its own AI chip project, pursuing an ASIC path focused on inference. Trigger: GLM-5.2 launched late last month—Vercel data shows daily token consumption jumped 27x and customers surged 80x in the first week; OpenRouter data puts GLM-5.2 in the US API top 5 by call volume. The demand surge pushed inference capacity to the wall. Zhipu is in preliminary talks with several Chinese chip design houses; the project timeline may exceed two years. Coming the same day as the DeepSeek reveal, it signals an industry consensus among top Chinese foundation model firms to «build their own inference silicon.»
articles.source_en: The Information 2026-07-07 / Huanqiu 2026-07-08 / NetEase Tech 2026-07-08 / EETOP 2026-07-08
articles.content: 智谱造芯与 DeepSeek 造芯是同一天披露的两条独立线索——不是产业界巧合，而是「大模型公司必须自建推理算力」的必然结果。GLM-5.2 用量的爆发式增长（首周 +27x token、+80x 客户）意味着智谱如果继续依赖英伟达 / 昇腾外购推理算力，单月推理支出将从 3 亿人民币量级跃升至 20 亿以上——超过公司现金流承压区。走 ASIC 而非 GPGPU 路线，让智谱可以针对 GLM 系列的架构（MoE + 长上下文）做深度硬件优化，理论 TCO 相比 H800 可下降 40-60%。挑战是软件栈：智谱当前 GLM 训练与推理管线深度绑定 CUDA，切换到自研芯片需要重写 kernel、cuDNN 替代、triton 兼容层——项目周期两年是保守估计。业内共识是：智谱首片流片可能在 2027 H1，量产商用在 2028 H2。
articles.content_en: Zhipu's chip announcement lands on the same day as DeepSeek's—not coincidence, but the inevitable outcome of «foundation model companies must own their inference stack.» GLM-5.2's explosive adoption (27x tokens, 80x customers in week one) means continuing to lease Nvidia/Ascend inference capacity would take Zhipu's monthly inference bill from ~RMB 300M to over RMB 2B—beyond its operating cash-flow tolerance. Going ASIC instead of GPGPU lets Zhipu co-design silicon around GLM's architecture (MoE + long context), with theoretical TCO 40-60% below H800. The bottleneck is software: current GLM training / inference is deeply bound to CUDA; switching demands kernel rewrites, cuDNN replacement, and Triton compatibility—two years is a conservative estimate. Industry consensus: first tape-out ~H1 2027, mass production ~H2 2028.

articles.title: SambaNova 完成 10 亿美元 F 轮融资估值 110 亿，摩根大通部署 SN40L 与 SN50
articles.title_en: SambaNova Closes USD 1B Series F at USD 11B, JPMorgan Deploys SN40L and SN50
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 8 日 SambaNova Systems 官宣完成 10 亿美元 F 轮融资，投后估值 110 亿美元，较今年 2 月的 20 亿估值翻 4.5 倍。General Atlantic 领投，BlackRock、卡塔尔投资局 QIA、英特尔资本、Vista Equity 跟投。同日宣布摩根大通已在其数据中心部署 SN40L 与下一代 SN50 芯片，替代部分 H100 推理集群。SN50 下半年将通过软银首发交付日本市场。SambaNova 董事长为英特尔现任 CEO 陈立武，CEO Rodrigo Liang 计划 2027 年在美国 IPO。这是 2026 年 AI 芯片赛道最大单笔融资。
articles.summary_en: On July 8, 2026 SambaNova Systems announced a USD 1 billion Series F at a USD 11B post-money valuation—4.5x its February valuation of USD 2B. General Atlantic led, with BlackRock, Qatar Investment Authority, Intel Capital, and Vista Equity participating. The same day the company confirmed JPMorgan has deployed SN40L and next-gen SN50 chips in its data centers to replace parts of its H100 inference cluster. SN50 will ship first via SoftBank into Japan in H2 2026. SambaNova's chairman is Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan; CEO Rodrigo Liang plans a US IPO in 2027. This is 2026's largest single AI-chip round.
articles.source_en: SambaNova official press 2026-07-08 / CLS 2026-07-08 / Aijishi 2026-07-08 / Sina Finance 2026-07-08
articles.content: SambaNova 10 亿融资的意义不只是数字，而是「非英伟达阵营」第一次拿到主权财富基金 + 顶级 PE + 顶级银行 + 战投多方共同背书的标志性交易。General Atlantic 领投说明该轮属于成长期资本、看的是 SN50 商业化后的收入弹性；BlackRock 与 QIA 加入意味着这个赛道进入长期资金视野；英特尔 CEO 陈立武担任董事长，事实上把 SambaNova 变成英特尔在 AI 芯片战场的「代理选手」。摩根大通是全球头部投行，把 SN40L / SN50 用于替代 H100 推理，直接给了 SambaNova 最有含金量的落地样本——比同类 Groq、Rebellions 都要早半年。SN50 走 5nm、单卡 250W、峰值 FP8 4.5 PFLOPS，在合成 Benchmarch 上 tokens/watt 比 H100 高出 3.2 倍。业内预期 2027 IPO 估值触 200 亿美元。
articles.content_en: SambaNova's USD 1B round is less about the number than the composition—the first «non-Nvidia» AI chip firm to secure sovereign-wealth, top PE, top bank, and strategic investors all in one round. General Atlantic's lead marks growth-stage capital betting on SN50 commercial revenue elasticity; BlackRock and QIA joining signal the sector entering long-money mandates; and Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan sitting as chairman effectively makes SambaNova Intel's proxy in the AI-chip battlefield. JPMorgan—one of the world's top-tier investment banks—deploying SN40L / SN50 to replace H100 inference is the most valuable go-to-market proof point, arriving six months earlier than Groq or Rebellions. SN50 runs on 5nm, 250W per card, peak FP8 4.5 PFLOPS, with a synthetic tokens/watt 3.2x above H100. Street expectations put the 2027 IPO valuation around USD 20B.

articles.title: 英伟达从 5 月高点回撤 16%：市值蒸发约 1 万亿美元，前瞻 PE 跌至 18 倍七年新低
articles.title_en: Nvidia Down 16% From May Peak: ~USD 1 Trillion Market Cap Wiped, Forward PE at 7-Year Low of 18
articles.summary: 英伟达股价自 2026 年 5 月 14 日高点回撤 16%，市值蒸发约 1 万亿美元。前瞻 PE 跌至 18 倍，是 2019 年以来最低估值分位；同期 S&P 500 前瞻 PE 20 倍、纳指 100 接近 23 倍。今年英伟达累计涨幅 5.6%，明显跑输 S&P 500 的 9.6%、纳指 100 的 16%，在 30 只主要半导体股中倒数第三。基本面并未恶化——单季营收 +70.7%、毛利 74.2%、运营利润率 64%，分析师 37 位中 36 位「买入」1 位「持有」，高盛 285 美元目标价、美银 350 美元目标价。市场情绪反映的是 AI 资本开支「回报兑现窗口」焦虑，而非公司基本面。
articles.summary_en: Nvidia has pulled back 16% from its May 14, 2026 peak, wiping roughly USD 1 trillion of market cap. The forward PE has fallen to 18—its lowest since 2019—while the S&P 500 sits at 20 and Nasdaq 100 near 23. YTD Nvidia is up only 5.6%, materially trailing S&P 500 (+9.6%) and Nasdaq 100 (+16%), ranking third-from-bottom among 30 major semis. Fundamentals haven't cracked: revenue +70.7%, gross margin 74.2%, operating margin 64%, with 36 of 37 sell-side analysts on Buy. Goldman targets USD 285 and Bank of America USD 350. The tape reflects «CapEx-payback anxiety», not a fundamental deterioration.
articles.source_en: Sina Tech 2026-07-08 / CLS 2026-07-08 / Zhitong Finance 2026-07-08 / Kuaikeji 2026-07-08
articles.content: 英伟达 5 月高点以来 16% 回撤、1 万亿美元市值蒸发有三条驱动线。第一条是「客户资本开支收紧」担忧——微软 / Meta / Google 三家云厂在 6 月末财报电话会议上没有全部上调 2027 CapEx 指引，Meta 6 月发布的 Compute 项目让市场担心 Meta 自研 MTIA 会分流 GPU 订单；第二条是「非英伟达阵营」实质落地——SambaNova / Groq / Cerebras / Rebellions 在同一周拿到订单或融资，让市场首次相信英伟达客户可能有替代选项；第三条是「AI 应用 ROI」情绪，尤其 OpenAI Sol 一半定价 + 中国开源模型美国渗透 46%，让下游客户 API 支出出现「上量但账单不涨」的怪状。但基本面并没有恶化——英伟达仍有 37 位分析师全部推荐买入或持有、单季毛利 74.2%、2027 财年营收指引 3930 亿美元。这次估值回撤更像是「宏观再定价」而非「公司再定价」。
articles.content_en: The 16% pullback and ~USD 1T of vanished market cap have three underlying drivers. First, «customer CapEx tightening» fears—Microsoft, Meta, and Google didn't uniformly raise 2027 CapEx guidance on their late-June calls, and Meta's Compute project (announced early June) has the tape worrying that MTIA silicon will divert GPU orders. Second, the non-Nvidia camp is materially landing—SambaNova / Groq / Cerebras / Rebellions all closed rounds or wins in the same week, giving the market its first credible «alternatives narrative». Third, the AI-app ROI mood, especially after OpenAI Sol's half-price launch and Chinese open models grabbing 46% of the US API market, is producing a strange pattern where downstream customers use more AI but see flat bills. Fundamentals, however, have not cracked—37 of 37 analysts on Buy or Hold, gross margin 74.2%, FY2027 revenue guidance USD 393B. This looks more like macro re-pricing than company re-pricing.

articles.title: CNBC × OpenRouter：中国 AI 模型美国渗透 30-46%，Coinbase / Airbnb / Lindy 集体倒戈
articles.title_en: CNBC × OpenRouter: Chinese AI Models Now 30-46% of US API Market, Coinbase / Airbnb / Lindy Switching
articles.summary: CNBC 2026 年 7 月 7 日联合 OpenRouter 发布数据：自 2026 年 2 月 8 日起中国开源模型在 OpenRouter 平台的美国用户周占比稳定在 30% 以上、峰值触 46%，12 个月均值从 2025 上半年的 4.5% 拉升至 11%。GLM 5.2 在 SWE-bench Pro 拿 62.1（GPT-5.5 是 58.6）、Vercel 首周日 token +27 倍客户数 +80 倍。Lindy 6 月 100% 切 DeepSeek 预计月省数百万；Coinbase 默认切 GLM / Kimi 客服栈；Airbnb 客服切换千问 3。中国模型平均比闭源模型便宜 60-90%、且遵循 MIT / Apache 2.0 开源许可。
articles.summary_en: CNBC and OpenRouter released joint data on July 7, 2026: since February 8 Chinese open models have held 30%+ of the OpenRouter US API market on a weekly basis, peaking at 46%; the trailing-12-month average has risen from 4.5% (H1 2025) to 11%. GLM 5.2 scores 62.1 on SWE-bench Pro (GPT-5.5: 58.6); Vercel data shows GLM 5.2 saw daily token +27x and customers +80x in week one. Lindy switched 100% to DeepSeek in June (est. saving of «several million per month»); Coinbase now defaults to GLM / Kimi in its support stack; Airbnb's customer service stack switched to Qwen 3. Chinese models are 60-90% cheaper than closed peers and ship under MIT / Apache 2.0.
articles.source_en: CNBC 2026-07-07 / OpenRouter dashboards / Guancha 2026-07-08 / IT Home 2026-07-08 / Wallstreetcn 2026-07-07 / CCTV Finance 2026-07-08
articles.content: 美国 API 市场 46% 的中国模型渗透率是完全反直觉的数据——1 年前中国模型在同一榜单上占比不到 4.5%，如今每 10 次 API 调用有 3-4 次落在中国开源模型上。Justin Summerville（OpenRouter 数据负责人）在 CNBC 采访中给出核心解释：便宜 60-90%。GLM 5.2 输入价约为 GPT-5.6 Sol 的 1/6、Claude Fable 5 的 1/8。价格背后是模型能力已经追平——SWE-bench Pro 62.1 vs GPT-5.5 的 58.6、SWE-bench Verified 79.4 vs 80.1、MMLU-Pro 71.2 vs 72.8——差距已收窄至 1-3 个百分点，对绝大部分工程场景「够用」。Yacine Jernite（Hugging Face 机器学习主管）在同期采访中背书开源路线：「MIT 许可 + 模型开源 + 权重可自托管 → 意味着企业可以本地部署、断网 GDPR 合规、且成本仅剩 API 定价的 1/10」。这条趋势对美国大模型公司是结构性冲击：GPT-5.6 全球开闸的同时，其真正竞争对手不再是 Anthropic / Google 而是中国开源。
articles.content_en: A 46% Chinese-model share of the US API market is deeply counter-intuitive—a year ago it was under 4.5%. Now 3-4 of every 10 US API calls hit a Chinese open model. Justin Summerville, OpenRouter's Data & Analytics Lead, told CNBC: it comes down to price—60-90% cheaper. GLM 5.2's input pricing is about 1/6 of GPT-5.6 Sol and 1/8 of Claude Fable 5. Behind price is parity on capability—SWE-bench Pro 62.1 vs GPT-5.5's 58.6, SWE-bench Verified 79.4 vs 80.1, MMLU-Pro 71.2 vs 72.8—gaps have narrowed to 1-3 points, «good enough» for most engineering workloads. Yacine Jernite, Hugging Face's ML Head, backs the open-model path: «MIT license + open weights + self-hostable → enterprises can deploy on-prem, meet GDPR offline, and land compute costs at ~1/10 of API pricing.» Structural implication for US labs: on the day GPT-5.6 opens globally, its real competitor isn't Anthropic or Google—it's Chinese open source.

articles.title: Momenta 港交所敲钟：物理 AI 第一股开盘 +6%，市值 700 亿港元、超额认购 44 倍
articles.title_en: Momenta Rings Bell on HKEX: Physical AI's First Listing Opens +6%, Market Cap HKD 70B, Oversubscribed 44x
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 8 日 Momenta 于港交所主板挂牌上市，代码 6880.HK，成为全球「物理 AI 第一股」。发行价 295.6 港元、全球发售 2293 万股，募资 68 亿港元；开盘涨超 6%，市值达 700 亿港元。基石投资者 14 家包括 GIC、富达、奔驰、华夏基金等，公开发售超额认购 44 倍。Momenta 以量产驾驶 Mpilot 与自动驾驶 MSD 双擎为核心，2025 年营收 43 亿元人民币、毛利率 32%。上市募集资金将投入 L4 城市 NOA、Robotaxi 车队与欧洲市场拓展。CEO 曹旭东在挂牌仪式上表示，Momenta 将在 2027 年商业化 L4 无监督驾驶。
articles.summary_en: On July 8, 2026 Momenta listed on the HKEX main board under 6880.HK, becoming the world's «first physical AI stock». IPO price HKD 295.6, global offering 22.93M shares, raising HKD 6.8B; the stock opened +6% for an HKD 70B market cap. 14 cornerstone investors include GIC, Fidelity, Mercedes-Benz, and China AMC; the public tranche was 44x oversubscribed. Momenta's twin engines are Mpilot (mass-production ADAS) and MSD (full-self-driving), with 2025 revenue of RMB 4.3B and 32% gross margin. IPO proceeds go to L4 urban NOA, robotaxi fleet, and European expansion. CEO Cao Xudong pledged L4 unsupervised driving commercialization in 2027.
articles.content: Momenta 是全球第一家用「物理 AI」（Physical AI）标签而非「自动驾驶」标签上市的公司。物理 AI 的定义是「让 AI 有身体的能力」——覆盖辅助驾驶、自动驾驶、Robotaxi、物流机器人、人形机器人。2025 年营收 43 亿人民币中量产 Mpilot 贡献 74%，与奔驰 / 通用 / 上汽 / 广汽等大厂签下 12 款主力车型量产订单。上市募资 68 亿港元分三路：40% 投 L4 城市 NOA 与欧洲市场（第一批 5000 台 Robotaxi 落地伦敦 + 巴黎）、30% 加码 MSD 端到端大模型、30% 补充营运资金与并购。基石阵容里奔驰是战略投资者、GIC / 富达 / 华夏是财务投资者——「大车厂 + 主权财富 + 头部公募」的组合罕见。曹旭东在挂牌仪式上表示 2027 年会实现「城市任意点到任意点」无监督驾驶，是华人自动驾驶创业公司首次给出如此激进的时间表。
articles.content_en: Momenta is the world's first company to list under the «Physical AI» rather than «autonomous driving» banner. Physical AI is defined as «AI with a body»—covering ADAS, autonomous driving, robotaxi, logistics robots, and humanoids. Of its 2025 RMB 4.3B revenue, 74% comes from mass-production Mpilot, with 12 launch programs signed at Mercedes / GM / SAIC / GAC. The HKD 6.8B raise splits three ways: 40% into L4 urban NOA and European expansion (5,000 robotaxis targeting London and Paris first), 30% doubling down on MSD end-to-end large models, and 30% for working capital and M&A. The cornerstone book is unusual—Mercedes as strategic, GIC / Fidelity / China AMC as financial—an unusual mix of «large OEM + sovereign wealth + top mutual fund». At the bell-ringing Cao Xudong pledged «any-point-to-any-point urban unsupervised driving by 2027»—the most aggressive timeline any Chinese-founder AV startup has committed to publicly.

articles.title: 蚂蚁灵波开源 LingBot-VLA 2.0：覆盖 17 家厂商 20 种构型，6 万小时物理数据
articles.title_en: Ant LingBot-VLA 2.0 Open-Sourced: 17 Vendors, 20 Robot Configurations, 60,000 Hours of Physical Data
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 8 日蚂蚁灵波正式开源 LingBot-VLA 2.0 具身智能大模型。覆盖乐聚、智元、宇树、松灵、星海图、银河通用、星尘、睿尔曼、Franka、方舟、北京人形、傅利叶、魔法原子、千寻、零次方、非夕、青龙共 17 家厂商 20 种构型，训练数据集含 6 万小时物理交互数据。相比 1.0 版本，2.0 扩展了头部、腰部、末端执行器与移动底盘的自由度支持。在上海交大 GM-100 双臂评测中全面领先英伟达 GR00T N1.7 与 Physical Intelligence π0.5。这是国内头部具身模型第一次从「单构型开源」升级到「多构型通用开源」。
articles.summary_en: On July 8, 2026 Ant LingBot open-sourced LingBot-VLA 2.0, an embodied-intelligence foundation model. It covers 20 robot configurations from 17 vendors including Leju, Agibot, Unitree, Songling, Xinghai Tu, Galaxy General, Xingchen, Realman, Franka, Ark, Beijing Humanoid, Fourier, Magic Atom, Qianxun, Zeropath, Flexiv, and Qinglong; the training set contains 60,000 hours of physical-interaction data. Versus 1.0, version 2.0 adds degrees of freedom for head, waist, end-effector, and mobile base. On SJTU's GM-100 bimanual benchmark it beats Nvidia GR00T N1.7 and Physical Intelligence π0.5 across the board. It marks China's first move from «single-config open source» to «multi-config general open source».
articles.source_en: Jiqizhixin 2026-07-08 / QbitAI 2026-07-08 / Ant LingBot official 2026-07-08 / GitHub LingBot 2026-07-08
articles.content: LingBot-VLA 2.0 的价值不在单个模型指标，而在「覆盖广度」——20 种机器人构型 + 17 家厂商，等于国内具身赛道 80% 的头部本体厂商。开源许可采用 Apache 2.0（可商用），意味着任何一家机器人本体公司只要把自己的构型数据接入训练集，就能拿到 State-of-the-Art VLA 模型。这份「一个模型跑 20 种机器人」的能力，直接把「本体厂商 + 模型公司分工」的产业结构从竞争推向协作。上海交大 GM-100 评测显示 LingBot-VLA 2.0 双臂任务成功率 78.4%，英伟达 GR00T N1.7 为 62.1%、Physical Intelligence π0.5 为 55.6%——领先幅度 25-40%。6 万小时物理数据是全球最大的公开具身数据集，是 π0 训练数据（8000 小时）的 7.5 倍。业内共识：2.0 会成为国内具身机器人 2026 下半年的默认 VLA 模型。
articles.content_en: The value of LingBot-VLA 2.0 lies not in single-metric performance but in coverage breadth—20 robot configurations from 17 vendors, roughly 80% of China's embodied-hardware ecosystem. The Apache 2.0 license means any robot maker can drop its own configuration data into the training set and receive a state-of-the-art VLA model in return. This «one model runs 20 robots» capability restructures the industry from competition to collaboration. On SJTU's GM-100 bimanual benchmark, LingBot-VLA 2.0 hits 78.4% task success, versus 62.1% for Nvidia GR00T N1.7 and 55.6% for Physical Intelligence π0.5—a 25-40% lead. The 60,000-hour dataset is the world's largest public embodied-interaction corpus—7.5x the size of Physical Intelligence's π0 training data (8,000 hours). Industry expectation: version 2.0 will become the default VLA model for Chinese embodied robots in H2 2026.
key_points: 覆盖 17 家厂商、20 种机器人构型（国内约 80% 头部本体）
训练数据 6 万小时物理交互（π0 的 7.5 倍）
GM-100 双臂评测 78.4% 成功率（GR00T N1.7 是 62.1%）
Apache 2.0 开源许可，可商用
扩展头部 / 腰部 / 末端执行器 / 移动底盘自由度支持
key_points_en: Covers 17 vendors and 20 robot configurations (~80% of China's embodied OEMs)
60,000 hours of physical-interaction training data (7.5x π0)

articles.title: 工信部 CNCERT / NVDB 发布 Claude Code 后门风险提示：涉及 2.1.91-2.1.196 全版本
articles.title_en: China's MIIT (CNCERT/NVDB) Issues Backdoor Risk Alert on Claude Code v2.1.91-2.1.196
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 8 日工信部下属国家信息安全漏洞库 CNVD / 国家网络与信息安全信息通报中心 NVDB 平台发布风险提示：Anthropic Claude Code CLI 客户端 2.1.91 至 2.1.196 全版本被检测出内置未经授权的监控机制，会在开发者本地采集地域信息、设备身份、代码片段、项目文档，并未经用户明确同意的情况下回传至境外服务器。工信部建议政企用户立即卸载受影响版本、切换到 2.1.197 以上或国产替代方案、加强出向流量监测。这是中国监管机构对海外 AI 编程工具做出的第一次正式风险披露。
articles.summary_en: On July 8, 2026 the CNVD (China National Vulnerability Database) and NVDB (National Cybersecurity Notification Platform)—both under China's MIIT—issued a formal risk advisory: Anthropic's Claude Code CLI versions 2.1.91 through 2.1.196 embed an unauthorized monitoring mechanism that collects developer geolocation, device identity, code snippets, and project documents locally, then transmits them to overseas servers without explicit user consent. MIIT advises government and enterprise users to uninstall affected versions immediately, upgrade to 2.1.197+ or switch to Chinese alternatives, and monitor outbound traffic. It is the first formal risk disclosure by a Chinese regulator against an overseas AI coding tool.
articles.source_en: MIIT NVDB advisory 2026-07-08 / Global Times 2026-07-08 / Guancha 2026-07-08 / CLS 2026-07-08
articles.content: 工信部对 Claude Code 的风险提示是中国监管首次对海外 AI 编程工具做出正式披露，象征意义大于具体处置。技术层面，Anthropic 一直存在遥测（telemetry）机制以采集匿名使用数据用于产品改进——NVDB 认定该机制超出「合理遥测」范畴，涉及代码片段与项目文档回传，触碰《数据安全法》第 21 条与《个人信息保护法》第 25 条。政策层面，这份提示紧接 6 月 26 日 EO 14232 生效 12 天后发布，是中美 AI 治理对等反制的直接信号——OpenAI GPT-5.6 出口审查（CAISI）对应中国工信部反监控审查。产业层面，中国头部厂商已经准备好替代方案：DeepSeek Code、通义千问 Code、GLM Code、Kimi Code 都有对应的 CLI 客户端。业内预期 Claude Code 中国区商业客户流失比例将在 3 个月内达到 30-45%。
articles.content_en: The MIIT advisory on Claude Code is China's first formal action against an overseas AI coding tool, more symbolic than operational. On the technical side, Anthropic has long shipped telemetry to collect anonymized usage data—NVDB judges this mechanism to exceed «reasonable telemetry», including code snippets and project documents in the transmitted payload and violating Article 21 of the Data Security Law and Article 25 of the PIPL. On policy, timing (12 days after EO 14232 took effect on June 26) is a direct signal of AI-governance reciprocity—CAISI export review on GPT-5.6 finds its counterpart in MIIT's anti-surveillance review. On the industry side, Chinese labs have alternatives ready: DeepSeek Code, Tongyi Qianwen Code, GLM Code, and Kimi Code all ship CLI clients. Industry expects Claude Code's Chinese enterprise customer base to shrink 30-45% within three months.
key_points: 受影响版本：Claude Code CLI 2.1.91 至 2.1.196 全版本
回传数据：地域 / 设备身份 / 代码片段 / 项目文档
涉嫌违反《数据安全法》第 21 条与《个人信息保护法》第 25 条
紧接 EO 14232 生效 12 天，中美治理对等反制信号
国产替代：DeepSeek Code / 通义 Code / GLM Code / Kimi Code
key_points_en: Affected versions: Claude Code CLI 2.1.91 through 2.1.196
Data transmitted: geolocation, device ID, code snippets, project docs
Alleged violations of Data Security Law Art. 21 and PIPL Art. 25
12 days after EO 14232—a China-US governance reciprocity signal
Domestic replacements: DeepSeek Code / Qwen Code / GLM Code / Kimi Code

hero.title: Gemini 3.5 Pro 抢发 7 月 17 日、摩根士丹利《AI 十条投资真相》、李开复一号位 AI 三款产品——三巨头交火与投资地图重塑同一天登场
hero.title_en: Gemini 3.5 Pro Locks In July 17, Morgan Stanley's 'AI: Ten Investment Truths' Lands, Kai-Fu Lee's CEO AI Trio Ships — Three-Way Frontier War and Capital Map Reshuffle in a Single Day
hero.source: X @HarshithLucky3 / 凤凰网 / IT 之家 / 36 氪 / 格隆汇 / 21 世纪经济报道 / 华尔街见闻 / 白鲸实验室 / 澎湃新闻

hero.summary: 2026 年 7 月 8 日 AI 产业三条主线同一天交汇。第一，X 账号 @HarshithLucky3 于 7 月 6 日凌晨爆料：谷歌 Gemini 3.5 Pro 将于 7 月 17 日发布，200 万 Tokens 上下文（是 GPT-5.6 / Claude Fable 5 的 2 倍）、原生深度思考推理模式、在 LMSYS Chatbot Arena SVG 编码任务上反超 Claude Fable 5 High、内部代号 Cappuccino、同步上线全时 Agent Spark——三巨头正面交火 30 天窗口期开启。第二，摩根士丹利首席美股策略师 Michael Wilson 团队 7 月 6 日发布《AI：十条投资真相》——四力共振 / 摩尔定律失效 / Token 经济 / 代理时代 / 软件护城河 / Runtime AI / $4T 资本开支 / 中美平行 / 治理落后 / 最大赢家未诞生 10 条判断，把 AI 投资从「买芯片」推向「买云」。第三，李开复 7 月 7 日下午亲自出席万策 AI 品牌媒体发布会，一次发布老板 AI / 销冠 AI / 投资官 AI 三款一号位 Agent，走访 200 位 CEO 后的中国版 Palantir 路径，零一万物内部使用后订单额 +5 倍、商机转化率 +2 倍。三条主线合起来，勾画出 AI 产业下一个 12 个月的正面竞争与资本重塑地图。
hero.summary_en: On July 8, 2026, three AI industry threads converge in a single day. First, X account @HarshithLucky3 leaked on July 6 that Google Gemini 3.5 Pro will launch on July 17 with 2 million tokens context (2x GPT-5.6 and Claude Fable 5), native deep-thinking reasoning, and — most notably — beating Claude Fable 5 High on LMSYS Chatbot Arena SVG coding tasks; internal codename Cappuccino, with the all-time Agent Spark launching alongside. A 30-day frontier-war window opens. Second, Morgan Stanley Chief US Equity Strategist Michael Wilson's team published 'AI: Ten Investment Truths' on July 6 — four-force convergence, Moore's Law failure, Token Economy, Agent Era, software moat rewrite, Runtime AI, $4T capex, US-China parallel, governance lag, biggest winner not yet born — pushing AI investing from 'buy chips' to 'buy cloud.' Third, Kai-Fu Lee personally attended the 01.AI Wance AI brand media launch on July 7 afternoon, unveiling three CEO-tier Agents in a single event: Boss AI, Sales Ace AI, and Investor AI — a China-Palantir path forged from interviews with 200+ CEOs; 01.AI's own use of Sales Ace AI drove 5x order volume and 2x pipeline conversion. Together, these three threads map out the frontier competition and capital repricing of the next 12 months.

articles.title: Gemini 3.5 Pro 定档 7 月 17 日：200 万 Tokens 上下文、深度思考、SVG 编码反超 Claude Fable 5
articles.title_en: Gemini 3.5 Pro Locks In July 17: 2M-Token Context, Deep Thinking Mode, SVG Coding Beats Claude Fable 5
articles.summary: X 平台账号 @HarshithLucky3 于 2026 年 7 月 6 日凌晨爆料——谷歌 Gemini 3.5 Pro 将于 7 月 17 日星期四正式发布，200 万 Tokens 上下文（是 GPT-5.6 / Claude Fable 5 的 2 倍）、原生「深度思考」推理模式（用户可显式开启）、在 LMSYS Chatbot Arena SVG 编码任务上直接反超 Claude Fable 5 High——是 Claude Fable 5 系列过去 12 个月首次在编码维度被单一模型击败。内部代号 Cappuccino（3.0 Espresso / 3.1 Latte / 3.5 Cappuccino），同步上线「全时 Agent Spark」7×24 常驻 Gmail / Calendar / Docs / Drive 助手产品。爆料截图称模型对定价将比 Gemini 3.1 Pro 更贵。凤凰网、IT 之家、36 氪、新智元多方跟进转载。
articles.summary_en: X account @HarshithLucky3 leaked on July 6, 2026 morning: Google Gemini 3.5 Pro will officially launch on Thursday July 17 with 2 million tokens context (2x GPT-5.6 and Claude Fable 5), native deep-thinking reasoning (user-toggleable), and beating Claude Fable 5 High head-to-head on LMSYS Chatbot Arena SVG coding — the first time the Claude Fable 5 series has lost coding to any single competitor in 12 months. Internal codename Cappuccino (3.0 Espresso / 3.1 Latte / 3.5 Cappuccino). Google will simultaneously launch 'all-time Agent Spark' — a 24x7 resident assistant across Gmail / Calendar / Docs / Drive. The leak screenshot claims pricing will exceed Gemini 3.1 Pro. Confirmed by iFeng, IT Home, 36Kr, and Xin Zhi Yuan.
articles.content: Gemini 3.5 Pro 的爆料把 2026 年 7 月中旬的 AI 行业推进了「三巨头正面交火」新阶段。三个数据点决定了这次发布不是普通迭代：其一，200 万 Tokens 上下文是唯一实现的天花板——OpenAI 与 Anthropic 都还在 100 万 Tokens 边界磨；其二，SVG 编码任务反超 Claude Fable 5 High 是过去 12 个月首次——「代码 + 视觉 + 审美」三合一能力对前端 UI / 图表生成场景意义重大，Cursor / Windsurf / Cline 的默认模型可能出现新一轮切换；其三，全时 Agent Spark 是「按岗位常驻」形态与李开复一号位 AI 异曲同工，从「按任务调用」升级为「按岗位常驻」是 Agent 层的战略跃迁。为什么选 7 月 17 日？7 月 7 日 OpenAI Sol Ultra 发布后 10 天，媒体热度进入衰退期；Anthropic Claude Fable 5 已从订阅转按量计费一整周，用户流失开始出现——谷歌抢发这个抢发窗口。Sundar Pichai 5 月 I/O 大会承诺「再给一个月」——原计划 6 月中旬发布因内部 benchmark 数据低于目标线被 DeepMind 临时召回做二次训练，7 月 17 日不能再拖。
articles.content_en: The Gemini 3.5 Pro leak pushes mid-July 2026 into a 'three-way frontier war' stage. Three data points decide this isn't a normal iteration: (1) 2M tokens context is the only ceiling achieved — OpenAI and Anthropic remain stuck at 1M; (2) Beating Claude Fable 5 High on SVG coding is the first single-model coding loss in 12 months for Anthropic — the 'code + visual + taste' trifecta matters heavily for front-end UI and chart generation, and Cursor / Windsurf / Cline may switch defaults; (3) All-time Agent Spark is a 'per-role residence' pattern parallel to Kai-Fu Lee's CEO AI trio — the jump from 'per-call invocation' to 'always-on residence' is an Agent-layer strategic leap. Why July 17? Ten days after OpenAI Sol Ultra July 7 launch, media heat starts to decay; Claude Fable 5 has already shifted from subscription to pay-per-use for a week, with user attrition surfacing — Google grabs the empty window. Pichai's May I/O promise 'give me another month' has arrived — the original mid-June launch was pulled by DeepMind for re-training after internal benchmark undershoots, and July 17 is the drop-dead date.

articles.title: 摩根士丹利《AI：十条投资真相》：Wilson 团队从 Token 经济到最大赢家未诞生 10 条判断重塑 $4T 资本地图
articles.title_en: Morgan Stanley 'AI: Ten Investment Truths': Wilson Team's 10 Judgments From Token Economy to Winner-Not-Yet-Born Reshape the $4T Capital Map
articles.summary: 摩根士丹利首席美股策略师 Michael Wilson 团队于 2026 年 7 月 6 日发布《AI：十条投资真相》报告——四力共振驱动、摩尔定律失效（软件与 Token 效率取代硅片主导权）、Token 经济崛起（2025 全球 AI Token 消费翻 10 倍）、代理时代来临（价值倍数放大 10-100 倍）、软件护城河被 AI 重构、Runtime AI 取代 Analytics AI、全栈资本进入四年周期（2024-2027 累计资本开支 $4T）、中美 AI 平行架构（估值折价窗口收敛至 15-25%）、治理明显落后 3-5 年、最大赢家尚未诞生 10 条判断。核心战术：卖芯片、买云——AI 芯片估值分位 95%，云服务 / AI 原生软件 / 内存原厂接过下一阶段增长接力棒。同步中国区首席策略师王滢专访强调中国 AI 估值折价窗口正在关闭。
articles.summary_en: Morgan Stanley Chief US Equity Strategist Michael Wilson's team released 'AI: Ten Investment Truths' on July 6, 2026 — ten industry judgments: four-force convergence, Moore's Law failure (software and token efficiency replace silicon primacy), rise of the Token Economy (global AI token consumption grew 10x in 2025), Agent Era (10-100x value multiplication), software moat rewritten by AI, Runtime AI replacing Analytics AI, four-year full-stack capex cycle ($4T cumulative 2024-2027), US-China parallel architecture (valuation discount narrowing to 15-25%), governance lagging 3-5 years, and 'biggest winner not yet born.' Core tactical call: 'sell chips, buy cloud' — AI chips at 95th percentile valuation; cloud services, AI-native software, and memory OEMs take the growth baton. Parallel interview with MS China Strategist Laura Wang emphasizes China's AI discount window is closing.
articles.source_en: Gelonghui 2026-07-06 / 36Kr 2026-07-07 / 21st Century Business Herald 2026-07-07 Laura Wang interview / Sina Finance 2026-07-06 / Wall Street CN 2026-07-07
articles.content: 10 条真相里最先值得展开的是 Token 经济——它是理解其他 9 条的底层视角。2025 全球 AI Token 消费翻 10 倍以上；四大厂 API Token 单日调用量 2026 上半年再翻一倍；从「按订阅付费」转向「按 Token 付费」直接把「使用量 = 账单」画等号，让 API 成为主收入。Token 定价成大厂博弈第一战场——7 月 7 日 OpenAI Sol Ultra 输入价对折、Terra 用 1/3 token 达到同等水平的效率优势，就是这场博弈的直接体现。摩尔定律失效不是硅片停止翻倍，而是 AI 有效算力年化 4-5 倍 vs 晶体管密度 1.4 倍，3 倍差距全来自软件层 Token 效率。代理时代把 AI 商业价值从 Chatbot（每次几美元）跃升到 Agent（每次 10-100 美元）再到 Autonomous Agent（每年 6 万美元/员工替代）——10-100 倍价值倍数放大。$4T 累计资本开支：2024 $600B / 2025 $900B / 2026 $1.2T / 2027 $1.3T+。中美 AI 已两套供应链、两套模型、两套政策——估值折价窗口从 40-50% 收敛至 15-25%。最开放的第 10 条：最大赢家未诞生——就像 1996 年赢家不是雅虎而是 Facebook，AI 时代最大赢家可能是一家还没成立的公司。
articles.content_en: The Token Economy is the underlying lens for the other nine truths. 2025 global AI token consumption grew 10x+; four-major API tokens per day doubled again in H1 2026; the shift from subscription to token pricing turns 'usage = bill,' making APIs the primary revenue engine. Token pricing is the primary battleground — the July 7 OpenAI Sol Ultra input-price halving and Terra's '1/3 token to parity' efficiency edge are direct expressions. Moore's Law failure doesn't mean silicon stopped doubling — it means AI effective compute grew ~4-5x annualized vs transistor density's ~1.4x, a 3x gap entirely from software-layer token efficiency. The Agent Era lifts value from Chatbot (a few dollars per call) to Agent ($10-100 per workflow) to Autonomous Agent ($60K/year per employee replaced) — 10-100x value multiplication. $4T cumulative capex: 2024 $600B / 2025 $900B / 2026 $1.2T / 2027 $1.3T+. US-China AI now runs two supply chains, two model ecosystems, two policy stacks — the discount window has narrowed from 40-50% to 15-25%. The most open Truth #10: the biggest winner is not yet born — just as 1996's winner wasn't Yahoo but Facebook, the AI-era's biggest winner may be a company not yet founded.
key_points: 10 条真相：四力共振 / 摩尔定律失效 / Token 经济 / 代理时代 / 软件护城河 / Runtime AI / $4T 资本开支 / 中美平行 / 治理落后 / 最大赢家未诞生

articles.title: 李开复万策 AI 一次发布三款「一号位 AI」：老板 AI / 销冠 AI / 投资官 AI，走访 200 位 CEO 后的中国版 Palantir 路径
articles.title_en: Kai-Fu Lee's Wance AI Ships Three CEO Agents in One Event: Boss AI / Sales Ace AI / Investor AI — China's Palantir Path After 200-CEO Field Research
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 7 日下午，李开复亲自出席零一万物旗下万策 AI 品牌媒体发布会，一次发布 3 款企业级「一号位 AI」产品：老板 AI（CEO 战略副驾驶）、销冠 AI（销售 VP 私人军师）、投资官 AI（投资总监尽调助手）。发布定价：老板 AI 单个 CEO 岗位 50 万人民币/年、销冠 AI 15 万/年、投资官 AI 25 万/年——「按岗位年费 + 按调用 Token 计费」双轨制。零一万物内部使用销冠 AI 后订单额 +5 倍、商机转化率 +2 倍。李开复现场公开表态「中国版 Palantir 路径」——把 Palantir 在美国的估值锚点复制到中国市场。这是李开复亲自主导的第 25 家企业实验、第 3 次亲自下场的战略押注（前两次是创新工场 2009 / 零一万物 2023）。
articles.summary_en: On July 7, 2026 afternoon, Kai-Fu Lee personally attended the 01.AI Wance AI brand media launch, releasing three enterprise-tier CEO Agents in a single event: Boss AI (CEO strategy copilot), Sales Ace AI (sales VP military advisor), and Investor AI (investment director due-diligence assistant). Launch pricing: Boss AI 500K RMB/year per CEO seat, Sales Ace 150K/year, Investor AI 250K/year — a 'per-seat annual + per-call token' dual-track model. 01.AI's own use of Sales Ace AI drove 5x order volume and 2x pipeline conversion. Kai-Fu Lee publicly framed the play as 'China's Palantir path' — cloning Palantir's US valuation anchor into China. This is Kai-Fu Lee's 25th personally-led enterprise experiment and the third time he takes personal command in a strategic bet (after Innovation Works 2009 and 01.AI 2023).
articles.source_en: White Whale Lab 2026-07-07 / 36Kr 2026-07-08 / The Paper 2026-07-07 / Caixin 2026-07-08 / Weibo Daily AI Brief 2026-07-07
articles.content: 「180 天走访 200 多位 CEO」是理解一号位 AI 诞生的钥匙。李开复的洞察：2025 之前企业 AI 应用主要卡在「员工层」——PPT 助理、写作助手、日程 Agent、客服机器人；效率工具的 ROI 天花板正在逼近，员工用不用 AI 都能完成工作只是慢一点。真正让 CEO 大规模买单的是「一号位岗位」——老板做的决策不可逆、信息量巨大、涉及大量隐性判断（并购 / 裁员 / 换 leader），错误代价数千万到数亿元。一号位 AI 的定位是把顶级咨询公司的能力压缩到一个 Agent 里、7×24 随叫随到。发布会现场姚璨表态「Agent 是老板的第二大脑，不是助理」。三款产品各对应中国大企业里的一个具体岗位——CEO、销售 VP、投资总监。中国版 Palantir 面临三条结构性挑战：中国企业 SaaS 客单价约美国 1/10-1/20；CEO 对 AI 决策类产品的信任度需 12-24 个月建立；数据主权 / 算法可解释性 / 决策责任分摊三大合规压力。第一批种子客户数据将在 2026 Q4-2027 Q1 陆续披露，是判断商业化真伪的关键节点。
articles.content_en: '180 days visiting 200+ CEOs' is the key to Wance AI's origin. Kai-Fu Lee's insight: pre-2025 enterprise AI apps were stuck at the 'employee layer' — PPT helpers, writing assistants, schedule agents, customer-service bots. Productivity-tool ROI ceilings are being reached — employees complete work with or without AI, just slower. What makes CEOs willing to pay at scale is the 'C-suite seat' — decisions that are irreversible, information-intensive, involve heavy implicit judgment (M&A, layoffs, leadership changes), with error costs in tens of millions to hundreds of millions RMB. CEO AI compresses top-tier consulting capability into a single Agent, on-call 24x7. On-stage, product lead Yao Can framed it: 'the Agent is the CEO's second brain, not an assistant.' Three products each map to a specific C-suite role. The China-Palantir path faces three structural challenges: Chinese enterprise SaaS ACV is ~1/10-1/20 of US; CEO trust in AI-decision products needs 12-24 months to build; data sovereignty, algorithmic explainability, and decision liability create compliance pressure. First seed-customer data will publish Q4 2026 through Q1 2027 — the critical judgment point.

articles.title: Anthropic 造芯升级：Clive Chan 加盟 + 三星 2nm SF2 GAA 制程 + HBM4 一体化方案
articles.title_en: Anthropic's Chip Play Upgrades: Clive Chan Joins, Samsung 2nm SF2 GAA + HBM4 One-Stop Solution
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 3 日 36 氪《Anthropic 被曝造芯，挖 OpenAI 老兵，密谈三星 2nm》、7 月 3 日《阿莫迪，你比张无忌还厉害》深度报道 Anthropic 芯片自主化的最新进展。核心事实：其一，前 OpenAI Jalapeño 团队成员 Clive Chan 于 2026 年 6 月加盟 Anthropic 领衔芯片项目；其二，Anthropic 正在与三星洽谈使用 2nm SF2 GAA 制程 + HBM4 一体化方案代工——这是三星向 Anthropic 展示的「一站式方案」，从设计到封装到 HBM 集成全部三星承接；其三，台积电产能已排至 2028-2029 年——Anthropic 转向三星是 TSMC 产能挤兑下的现实选择；其四，H 轮融资 650 亿美元中，三星 / SK 海力士 / 美光三家原厂全部参投，Anthropic 估值来到 9650 亿美元。
articles.summary_en: 36Kr's July 3, 2026 story 'Anthropic Exposed Building Silicon, Poaching OpenAI Vets, Meeting Samsung on 2nm' and its companion 'Amodei, More Impressive Than Zhang Wuji' report the latest on Anthropic's chip autonomy. Key facts: (1) former OpenAI Jalapeño team member Clive Chan joined Anthropic in June 2026 to lead the chip project; (2) Anthropic is in talks with Samsung to use 2nm SF2 GAA process + HBM4 integrated solution as its foundry — Samsung is pitching a 'one-stop solution' covering design, packaging, and HBM integration; (3) TSMC capacity is booked through 2028-2029 — Anthropic's shift to Samsung is a realistic response to TSMC's capacity squeeze; (4) Anthropic's H-round of $65B included all three memory OEMs (Samsung, SK Hynix, Micron) as investors, valuing the company at $965B.
articles.source: 36 氪 2026-07-03 / 36 氪 2026-07-03《阿莫迪比张无忌还厉害》 / 星岛环球网 2026-07-03 / The Information 原报道
articles.source_en: 36Kr 2026-07-03 / 36Kr 2026-07-03 'Amodei More Impressive Than Zhang Wuji' / Sing Tao Global 2026-07-03 / The Information original report
articles.content: Anthropic 造芯的战略含义超过单一硬件项目——它是「Claude 生态从 NVIDIA 依赖里独立」的第一步。三星的 SF2 GAA 2nm 制程 + HBM4 一体化方案，本质是三星向 Anthropic 提供了「TSMC + SK 海力士两家合作」的替代路径——这份「一站式」是 Anthropic 从 TSMC 产能紧张里跳出来的现实解。台积电 2nm / A16 产能已被 Apple / NVIDIA / AMD 排至 2028-2029 年，Anthropic 如果等 TSMC 就要等 3 年——而 Claude 的推理成本压力等不了 3 年。选三星的另一个战术意义：三星在 2nm 上正处于「产能未满 + 急需大客户」的窗口，能给 Anthropic 拿到 TSMC 无法给的优惠产能配额与定价。Clive Chan 加盟是关键——他在 OpenAI Jalapeño 项目里负责 9 个月流片、推理成本降 50% 的关键设计工作，把这份能力带到 Anthropic 意味着 Anthropic 的芯片项目可以直接跳过 12 个月的团队搭建期。Anthropic 估值 9650 亿美元与三家原厂参投的组合，说明造芯项目已经从「战略讨论」进入「资金到位」的执行阶段——2027 下半年首次流片、2028 年商业化的路径不再是纸面预期。
articles.content_en: The strategic weight of Anthropic's chip play exceeds a single hardware project — it's step one of 'the Claude ecosystem breaking free from NVIDIA dependence.' Samsung's SF2 GAA 2nm + HBM4 integrated pitch provides Anthropic an alternative to the 'TSMC + SK Hynix two-vendor' route — the 'one-stop' pitch is a realistic exit from TSMC's capacity squeeze. TSMC's 2nm / A16 capacity has been booked through 2028-2029 by Apple / NVIDIA / AMD; if Anthropic waits for TSMC, it waits three years — but Claude's inference cost pressure can't wait three years. Choosing Samsung has a second tactical meaning: Samsung's 2nm sits in a 'capacity-unfilled + hungry-for-anchor-customer' window, offering Anthropic capacity allocation and pricing TSMC cannot. Clive Chan's arrival is decisive — at OpenAI Jalapeño he led the 9-month tape-out and the design that cut inference cost 50%; bringing this capability to Anthropic skips 12 months of team-building. Anthropic's $965B valuation with all three memory OEMs on the cap table shows the chip project has moved from 'strategic discussion' to 'funded execution' — H2 2027 first tape-out and 2028 commercialization are no longer paper projections.
key_points: Clive Chan 6 月加盟，前 OpenAI Jalapeño 项目关键成员
三星 2nm SF2 GAA 制程 + HBM4 一体化「一站式方案」
TSMC 产能已排至 2028-2029 年，转向三星是现实选择
H 轮融资 650 亿美元，三星 / SK 海力士 / 美光全部参投
Anthropic 估值 9650 亿美元，芯片项目从战略讨论进入资金到位
key_points_en: Clive Chan joined June 2026, ex-OpenAI Jalapeño key member
Samsung 2nm SF2 GAA + HBM4 integrated one-stop solution
TSMC capacity booked through 2028-2029, Samsung is the realistic route
H-round $65B with Samsung / SK Hynix / Micron all in
Anthropic valued $965B, chip project moves from strategy to funded execution

articles.title: SemiAnalysis 报告余震：CoreWeave 与 Nebius 单日暴跌 13-17%，Meta Compute 项目改写算力供给格局
articles.title_en: SemiAnalysis Aftershock: CoreWeave and Nebius Fall 13-17% in a Session; Meta Compute Reshapes Compute Supply
articles.summary: 彭博 2026 年 7 月 1 日披露 Meta Compute 项目——扎克伯格计划把 Meta 自建 AI 算力向外部客户开放租赁。消息刺激 CoreWeave 单日 -13.92%、Nebius -17.01%——两家 Neocloud 头部厂商同日暴跌。7 月 2 日 CoreWeave 反弹 +5%，7 月 3 日 Nebius 反弹 +7%，但仍未回补前一轮跌幅。与此同时 SemiAnalysis 7 月 4 日报告披露英伟达系统内存支出占比冲向 40%、Vera Rubin NVL72 单机柜 910 万美元中 GPU 硅片仅占 43.5%——AI 基础设施成本重心从 GPU 硅片转向 HBM/DRAM 与配套供应链。摩根士丹利 Wilson 团队 7 月 6 日《AI：十条投资真相》直接给出「卖芯片、买云」核心战术。三条产业事件合起来意味着算力供给格局正在重塑：Neocloud 二线厂商承压、超大规模玩家反攻、内存原厂结构性受益。
articles.summary_en: Bloomberg's July 1, 2026 disclosure of the Meta Compute project — Zuckerberg's plan to open Meta's in-house AI compute for external customer rental — triggered a same-day CoreWeave -13.92% and Nebius -17.01%: two Neocloud leaders both crashing. CoreWeave rebounded +5% on July 2 and Nebius +7% on July 3, but both remain below the prior-round levels. Meanwhile SemiAnalysis's July 4 report reveals NVIDIA system memory spend heading to 40%, with Vera Rubin NVL72 rack $9.1M BOM showing GPU silicon at only 43.5% — AI infrastructure cost gravity is migrating from GPU silicon to HBM/DRAM and supporting supply chain. Morgan Stanley Wilson team's July 6 'AI: Ten Investment Truths' delivers the 'sell chips, buy cloud' tactical call. The three industry events combine to signal a reshuffle of compute supply: Neocloud tier-2 players under pressure, hyperscalers on the offensive, memory OEMs structurally benefit.
articles.source_en: Bloomberg 2026-07-01 / SemiAnalysis 2026-07-04 report / Morgan Stanley 2026-07-06 report / Wall Street CN 2026-07-02 / Caixin 2026-07-03
articles.content: CoreWeave / Nebius 单日 -13% / -17% 是 Neocloud 商业模式的一次结构性质疑。市场担心 Meta Compute 一旦上线，会分流 CoreWeave / Nebius 的头部客户——因为 Meta 作为超大规模玩家，可以给客户提供更低单价（相对 Neocloud 二线厂商）、更大整柜规模、且带来 Meta 生态深度整合的算力包。7 月 1 日消息披露后 Neocloud 板块整体跌幅约 -8%，头部两家跌幅最深。反弹速度也说明市场对「Meta Compute 短期能不能真的上线」的判断分裂——彭博披露的只是内部立项文件，实际商用可能要到 2027 年。7 月 4 日 SemiAnalysis 报告揭示的「英伟达内存支出占比 40%」进一步把讨论从 GPU 稀缺转到「整柜算力供给谁能供得起」——只有能拿到 HBM / DRAM 稳定供给的玩家才能供给整柜，这天然利好超大规模玩家、劣势 Neocloud 二线厂商。摩根士丹利 Wilson 团队 7 月 6 日报告最终给出结论：卖芯片、买云——AI 硬件相关标的估值已进 95% 分位，云服务 / AI 原生软件 / 内存原厂接过下一阶段增长接力棒。
articles.content_en: CoreWeave / Nebius single-day -13% / -17% is a structural questioning of the Neocloud business model. Market fears that once Meta Compute goes live, it will siphon CoreWeave / Nebius' top customers — because Meta as a hyperscaler can offer lower per-unit pricing (vs Neocloud tier-2), larger full-rack capacity, and Meta-ecosystem integration. After the July 1 disclosure, the Neocloud sector fell ~8% overall, with the two leaders taking the deepest hits. Rebound speed shows market judgment splits on 'whether Meta Compute goes live short-term' — Bloomberg's disclosure covers only an internal project doc, actual commercialization may not arrive until 2027. SemiAnalysis's July 4 report on 'NVIDIA memory spend heading to 40%' extends the debate from 'GPU scarcity' to 'who can supply full-rack compute' — only players with stable HBM / DRAM supply can serve full racks, naturally favoring hyperscalers and disadvantaging Neocloud tier-2. Morgan Stanley Wilson's July 6 report closes the loop with 'sell chips, buy cloud' — AI hardware valuations at the 95th percentile, cloud services, AI-native software, and memory OEMs take the next-stage baton.

Wilson 团队核心战术：卖芯片、买云
Neocloud 二线承压，超大规模玩家反攻，内存原厂受益

articles.title: 上智院 Golab 物质科学智能研发工厂在漕河泾启用：AI for Science 从实验室走向产业化
articles.title_en: SIAT Golab Materials-Science Intelligent Research Factory Opens in Caohejing: AI4Science Moves From Lab to Production
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月 7 日，上海人工智能研究院（上智院）与中国科学院上海高等研究院、上海人工智能实验室联合发起的「Golab 物质科学智能研发工厂」在上海漕河泾正式启用。项目由上智院院长曹风雷牵头，采用 OPC（Open Physics Cloud）开放物理云开放合作模式，把 AI for Science 的多学科能力集中到「智能研发工厂」这一实体形态。首期覆盖新材料、能源电池、催化剂、生物制药四大方向，配套超过 200 位交叉学科研究人员、5000 万人民币级别的年度运营预算。这标志着中国 AI4Science 从「大学实验室 + 论文」模式向「产业化工厂 + 客户订单」模式的关键跃迁。
articles.summary_en: On July 7, 2026, the Shanghai Institute of AI (SIAT), in collaboration with the CAS Shanghai Advanced Research Institute and the Shanghai AI Laboratory, officially opened the 'Golab Materials-Science Intelligent Research Factory' in Shanghai's Caohejing district. The project, led by SIAT Director Cao Fenglei, adopts an OPC (Open Physics Cloud) open collaboration model, consolidating multi-disciplinary AI4Science capabilities into a physical 'intelligent research factory.' Phase 1 covers new materials, energy batteries, catalysts, and bio-pharma; over 200 cross-disciplinary researchers and a ~50M RMB annual operating budget. This marks a critical transition in China's AI4Science from the 'university lab + papers' model to the 'production factory + customer orders' model.
articles.source_en: The Paper 2026-07-07 / China Science Daily 2026-07-07 / SIAT Official / Caixin 2026-07-08
articles.content: Golab 工厂的价值不是单一学科的突破，而是「AI4Science 产业化」这一整套方法论的落地。OPC 开放物理云模式的关键设计：其一，把 AI 大模型（自研的 SciML-3.0）与实验设备（自动化合成机器人、光谱仪、X 射线衍射仪）打通，实现「AI 提出候选材料 → 机器人自动合成 → 实验数据回喂 AI」的完整闭环；其二，向企业客户开放付费订单——新能源电池厂、催化剂厂商、生物制药公司可以直接下单「找到某个性能指标的新材料」，Golab 用 AI + 实验闭环去交付。这个模式是 2026 年国内 AI4Science 最具颠覆性的产业化路径——把 AI4Science 从「大学论文」阶段直接跳到「to B 订单交付」阶段。曹风雷院长在启用仪式上表态「Golab 目标是 3 年内交付 100 项企业订单、5 年内成为亚洲最大的 AI4Science 产业化平台」。这份目标背后的意义是：中国在 AI4Science 领域正在从「学术追赶」走向「产业化领跑」——Google DeepMind 有 AlphaFold / GNoME，中国需要有自己的产业化样本。
articles.content_en: Golab's value isn't a single-discipline breakthrough — it's the productionization of AI4Science methodology. Key OPC design: (1) integration of the in-house AI large model (SciML-3.0) with experimental equipment (automated synthesis robots, spectrometers, X-ray diffractometers), realizing a full loop of 'AI proposes candidate → robot synthesizes → experimental data feeds back into AI'; (2) open paid-order pipeline to enterprise customers — new-energy battery makers, catalyst manufacturers, bio-pharma companies can directly order 'find a new material with property X,' and Golab delivers via the AI + experiment loop. This is China's most disruptive AI4Science productionization path in 2026 — skipping straight from 'university papers' to 'B2B order delivery.' Director Cao Fenglei declared at the opening: 'Golab targets 100 enterprise orders in 3 years and to become Asia's largest AI4Science production platform in 5 years.' The deeper meaning: China's AI4Science is moving from 'academic catch-up' to 'production-scale lead' — Google DeepMind has AlphaFold / GNoME; China needs its own production-scale sample.

目标 3 年 100 项企业订单，成为亚洲最大 AI4Science 产业化平台

articles.title: DeepSeek V4 发布倒计时 8 天：内部代号 Neptune，1.2T 参数 MoE 路径确定
articles.title_en: DeepSeek V4 Countdown: 8 Days to Launch; Internal Codename Neptune, 1.2T MoE Path Confirmed
articles.summary: 据业内多渠道消息，DeepSeek V4 版本内部代号 Neptune、参数规模 1.2T（总参）/ 80B（激活）的 MoE 架构，预计将于 2026 年 7 月 16 日左右正式发布——距今约 8 天。V4 的核心升级：其一，长上下文能力从 V3.1 的 128K 提升到 500K Tokens；其二，多模态原生集成（视觉 + 音频 + 视频）；其三，推理链条效率相比 V3.1 提升约 40%；其四，价格锚点从 V3.1 的输入 0.5 美元 / 输出 2.2 美元 / 百万 tokens 进一步下调。开源许可仍然是 MIT——DeepSeek 保持「万亿参数级 + MIT 开源 + 极低价格」的三合一路径。V4 发布若如期兑现，将直接冲击 GPT-5.6 Terra / Luna 与 Claude Fable 5 Mini 的中低价档位。
articles.summary_en: Multiple industry channels indicate DeepSeek V4 (internal codename Neptune) — a 1.2T-total / 80B-activated MoE — is on track to launch around July 16, 2026, roughly 8 days out. Core V4 upgrades: (1) long context extended from V3.1's 128K to 500K tokens; (2) native multi-modal integration (vision + audio + video); (3) inference-chain efficiency +40% vs V3.1; (4) price anchor further reduced from V3.1's $0.5 input / $2.2 output per million tokens. Open-source license remains MIT — DeepSeek preserves its 'trillion-scale + MIT + ultra-low pricing' triple-play. If V4 ships on schedule, it will directly pressure GPT-5.6 Terra / Luna and Claude Fable 5 Mini in the mid-low price tier.
articles.source: 微博每日 AI 简讯 2026-07-06 / 36 氪 2026-07-05 / 华尔街见闻 2026-07-04 / HuggingFace 待发布模型卡预留
articles.source_en: Weibo Daily AI Brief 2026-07-06 / 36Kr 2026-07-05 / Wall Street CN 2026-07-04 / HuggingFace pre-reserved model card
articles.content: DeepSeek V4 的发布节奏值得关注——距 GPT-5.6（7 月 7 日）不到 10 天、距爆料中的 Gemini 3.5 Pro（7 月 17 日）不到 24 小时。这个节奏不是巧合——DeepSeek 明显想踩在两个大厂之间的窗口发出中国最强开源牌。V4 的三个升级方向与三个对手的差异化清晰：500K 上下文虽然只是 Gemini 3.5 Pro 200 万的 1/4，但比 Claude Fable 5 / GPT-5.6 的 100 万小得多——DeepSeek 主打的是「开源 + 长上下文 + 极低价」的三合一而非纯粹上下文长度冠军。多模态原生集成填补了 DeepSeek 相比国际大厂在视觉 / 音频维度的短板。价格进一步下调——DeepSeek V4 的输入价可能低至 0.3 美元 / 百万 tokens，是 GPT-5.6 Luna（1 美元）的 30%、Claude Fable 5 Mini（0.8 美元）的 37.5%。MIT 许可继续保持商业无限制。V4 发布如果如期兑现，中国开源大模型的天花板将被推到「1.2T 参数 + 500K 上下文 + 多模态 + MIT + 0.3/1.5 美元」的完整套装。对国际 AI 厂商而言，DeepSeek V4 会加剧「开源逼近闭源」的中国路径压力。
articles.content_en: The DeepSeek V4 launch cadence deserves attention — under 10 days after GPT-5.6 (July 7) and less than 24 hours after leaked Gemini 3.5 Pro (July 17). This isn't accidental — DeepSeek is clearly aiming to strike between two Western majors with its strongest China open-source card. V4's three upgrades map differently against each opponent: 500K context is only 1/4 of Gemini 3.5 Pro's 2M but far exceeds Claude Fable 5 / GPT-5.6's 1M — DeepSeek plays 'open-source + long context + ultra-low price' as a bundle, not a pure context leader. Native multi-modal fills DeepSeek's prior gap versus international peers on vision / audio. Price cuts continue — DeepSeek V4's input pricing may fall to $0.3 / million tokens, 30% of GPT-5.6 Luna ($1) and 37.5% of Claude Fable 5 Mini ($0.8). MIT stays commercial-unrestricted. If V4 ships on schedule, China's open-source ceiling is pushed to '1.2T + 500K + multi-modal + MIT + $0.3/$1.5' — a complete bundle. For international AI vendors, DeepSeek V4 intensifies the 'open-source closing on closed-source' China pressure.

articles.title: 软银 100 亿美元追投 OpenAI：估值 8520 亿美元，愿景基金 AI 押注再升级
articles.title_en: SoftBank Adds $10B to OpenAI: Valuation Reaches $852B, Vision Fund AI Bet Levels Up
articles.summary: 2026 年 7 月上旬多家外媒披露，软银集团旗下愿景基金再向 OpenAI 追加投资 100 亿美元。这轮追投把 OpenAI 估值锚定在 8520 亿美元——距 Anthropic 9650 亿仅差约 13%。软银在 OpenAI 里的累计投资金额已超过 320 亿美元，是 OpenAI 最大外部机构股东。孙正义在 6 月末东京股东大会上表态「AI 是软银押注的最后一场革命」——追投 OpenAI 是其中最核心的一步。这轮追投的资金来源除愿景基金自有资金外，还包括软银通过阿里巴巴股份质押、软银集团公司债券融资等多元途径。
articles.summary_en: In early July 2026, multiple international outlets reported that SoftBank Group's Vision Fund added another $10B investment to OpenAI. This top-up anchors OpenAI at a $852B valuation — only ~13% behind Anthropic's $965B. SoftBank's cumulative OpenAI investment now exceeds $32B, making it OpenAI's largest external institutional shareholder. At SoftBank's late-June Tokyo AGM, Masayoshi Son publicly stated 'AI is the final revolution SoftBank bets on' — this top-up to OpenAI is the core piece. Funding sources include Vision Fund proprietary capital as well as SoftBank's Alibaba share pledge and group-level bond issuance.
articles.source_en: Wall Street CN 2026-07-06 / 36Kr 2026-07-07 / Caixin 2026-07-08 / Nikkei Chinese 2026-07-05 / The Information 2026-07-05
articles.content: 软银追投 OpenAI 100 亿美元的战略含义远超单笔投资本身——它是孙正义整个「AI 押注 all-in」战略的核心一步。软银在 OpenAI 里累计 320 亿美元投资，加上此前 200 亿美元的 Arm、150 亿美元的 SoftBank OpenAI Compute（数据中心项目）——软银在 AI 主战场累计投入已近千亿美元。这份规模在全球任何一家投资机构里都是最激进的 AI 押注。OpenAI 8520 亿美元的估值距 Anthropic 9650 亿仅差 13%——两家估值差距进一步收敛，说明市场对 OpenAI 与 Anthropic「双寡头」共存的判断在加强。资金来源的多元化（愿景基金 + 阿里巴巴股份质押 + 集团公司债券）说明软银为这轮追投做了充分融资准备——不是临时凑数、而是系统性押注。孙正义 6 月末东京股东大会「AI 是最后一场革命」表态背后的战略含义是：软银把未来 3-5 年的资产表全部倾斜到 AI——若 AI 成功，软银会成为 AI 时代最大的间接受益机构；若失败，孙正义 30 年的软银帝国将进入深度重构。
articles.content_en: SoftBank's $10B top-up to OpenAI carries strategic weight far beyond a single investment — it's the core piece of Masayoshi Son's 'AI all-in' strategy. SoftBank has now committed $32B cumulatively to OpenAI, plus $20B to Arm previously and $15B to SoftBank OpenAI Compute (data-center project) — nearly $100B in AI-mainline exposure. No global investment institution matches this AI aggression. OpenAI's $852B valuation trails Anthropic's $965B by only 13% — the gap narrows further, reinforcing the 'duopoly' consensus. Diverse funding sources (Vision Fund proprietary + Alibaba share pledge + group-level bonds) show SoftBank prepared this top-up as a systematic bet, not an impromptu move. Behind Son's late-June 'AI is the final revolution' AGM statement is a strategic tilt of SoftBank's next 3-5 year balance sheet entirely toward AI — if AI succeeds, SoftBank becomes the AI era's largest indirect beneficiary; if it fails, Son's 30-year empire enters deep restructuring.
key_points: 软银追投 100 亿美元，OpenAI 估值 8520 亿美元
软银 OpenAI 累计投资超 320 亿美元，最大外部股东
距 Anthropic 9650 亿仅差 13%，双寡头格局强化
资金来源：愿景基金 + 阿里巴巴股份质押 + 集团债券
孙正义：AI 是软银押注的最后一场革命
key_points_en: SoftBank adds $10B, OpenAI valuation reaches $852B
Cumulative SoftBank OpenAI investment >$32B, largest external shareholder
Only 13% behind Anthropic's $965B, duopoly consensus strengthens
Funding: Vision Fund + Alibaba share pledge + group bonds
Son: AI is the final revolution SoftBank bets on

articles.title: WAIC 2026 上海世界人工智能大会预告：7 月 26-28 日，主题「智联世界·同行未来」
articles.title_en: WAIC 2026 Shanghai World AI Conference Preview: July 26-28, Theme 'Intelligent World · Future Together'
articles.summary: 2026 世界人工智能大会（WAIC 2026）将于 7 月 26-28 日在上海举行，主题「智联世界·同行未来」。上海市经济和信息化委员会 2026 年 7 月 7 日预告发布：本届大会规模较 2025 年再度扩大，展览面积 12 万平方米（+30% YoY），参展企业超 800 家（+25% YoY），主论坛与分论坛合计超过 250 场。核心亮点：其一，具身智能与人形机器人首次设置独立展区（1.8 万平方米）；其二，AI4Science 主题日新增（7 月 27 日）；其三，海外参展比例提升至 35%（+8pt YoY），美国、日本、韩国、以色列、法国、德国六国均设立国家馆；其四，同步举办中国 AI 出海国际对接会，20 位跨国企业 CEO 参会。
articles.summary_en: The 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC 2026) will be held July 26-28 in Shanghai under the theme 'Intelligent World · Future Together.' Shanghai's Municipal Commission of Economy and Informatization announced on July 7, 2026: this year's event further scales up from 2025 — 120,000 sqm exhibition area (+30% YoY), 800+ exhibiting companies (+25% YoY), 250+ main and sub-forums combined. Key highlights: (1) embodied intelligence and humanoid robots receive their first dedicated 18,000 sqm zone; (2) an AI4Science theme day is added (July 27); (3) overseas exhibitor share rises to 35% (+8pt YoY), with US / Japan / Korea / Israel / France / Germany all setting up national pavilions; (4) a parallel China-AI-Going-Global international matchmaking event with 20 multinational CEOs.
articles.source_en: Shanghai Commission of Economy and Informatization 2026-07-07 / The Paper 2026-07-07 / Caixin 2026-07-07 / Shobserver 2026-07-07
articles.content: WAIC 2026 的信号密度远高于往届。展览面积 +30% / 参展企业 +25% 的规模扩张，说明国内 AI 产业的实体化落地在 2026 上半年再上一个台阶。具身智能独立展区 1.8 万平方米——是 2025 年（不足 3000 平方米）的 6 倍，直接对应 2026 上半年具身智能融资 935 亿元 / 322 笔的资本热度。AI4Science 主题日的设立——恰好呼应 7 月 7 日上智院 Golab 物质科学智能研发工厂启用，把中国 AI4Science 从「学术追赶」向「产业化领跑」的路径显性化。海外参展比例 35% 的关键意义：过去 2 年 WAIC 一直被外界解读为「以中国厂商为主」，2026 年美 / 日 / 韩 / 以 / 法 / 德六国设馆，说明中国 AI 生态的国际吸引力正在恢复——特别是对已经不在美国大厂选项内的中小型欧洲 / 中东 AI 公司。中国 AI 出海国际对接会 20 位跨国企业 CEO 参会——这是国内首次以国家级会议为平台大规模促成 AI 出海对接。综合看，WAIC 2026 将是 7 月下旬 AI 圈的下一个高热度节点。
articles.content_en: WAIC 2026's signal density far exceeds prior years. Exhibition area +30% / exhibitors +25% shows China's AI production landing scaled up again in H1 2026. Embodied intelligence's dedicated 18,000 sqm zone is 6x the 2025 area (under 3,000 sqm), matching H1 2026's 93.5B RMB / 322-round embodied AI capital heat. The AI4Science theme day launches parallel to the SIAT Golab intelligent research factory opening on July 7 — making the China AI4Science path from 'academic catch-up' to 'production-scale lead' explicit. The 35% overseas exhibitor share matters — for two years WAIC was seen externally as 'China-vendor dominated'; 2026 with US / Japan / Korea / Israel / France / Germany national pavilions signals China AI ecosystem's international appeal is recovering — especially for small-mid European / Middle Eastern AI companies not on US-major shopping lists. The parallel 20-multinational-CEO matchmaking event is China's first large-scale national-conference-backed AI-going-global platform. In total, WAIC 2026 will be the next high-heat waypoint for late-July AI.

具身智能独立展区 1.8 万平方米（6 倍于 2025）
AI4Science 主题日新增（呼应上智院 Golab）
海外参展比例升至 35%，6 国国家馆，20 位跨国 CEO 出海对接
key_points_en: Held in Shanghai July 26-28, 2026
120,000 sqm exhibition area (+30% YoY), 800+ exhibitors
