AI4Science theme day added (echoing SIAT Golab)
Overseas exhibitor share up to 35%, 6-country pavilions, 20 CEOs at going-global event

articles.title: Anthropic 反击：Claude Fable 5 Mini 加回 Pro 套餐、Mythos 6 预告 8 月上旬
articles.title_en: Anthropic Strikes Back: Claude Fable 5 Mini Restored to Pro Plan; Mythos 6 Teased for Early August
articles.summary: 在 7 月 7 日 OpenAI GPT-5.6 三档矩阵与 7 月 6 日 Gemini 3.5 Pro 爆料的双重冲击下，Anthropic 于 2026 年 7 月 8 日发布应对策略：其一，Claude Fable 5 Mini 重新加回 Claude Pro / Team 订阅套餐——修正 7 月 7 日按量计费切换后的用户流失；其二，Claude Mythos 6 提前预告——Anthropic 官方博客确认下一代旗舰将于「8 月上旬」发布，是原计划 Q3 后期的提前；其三，紧急下架 Claude Code 的 147 中国域名黑名单功能——回应 7 月 6 日的信任危机。CEO 阿莫迪同日在《华盛顿邮报》发文强调「Anthropic 的护城河不是单一模型能力、是安全与企业级信任」。
articles.summary_en: Under the July 7 OpenAI GPT-5.6 three-tier matrix and July 6 Gemini 3.5 Pro leak's combined pressure, Anthropic released its counter-strategy on July 8, 2026: (1) Claude Fable 5 Mini restored to Claude Pro / Team plans — correcting user attrition post the July 7 pay-per-use shift; (2) Claude Mythos 6 pre-announced — Anthropic's official blog confirms the next flagship launches in 'early August,' ahead of the originally-planned late Q3; (3) urgent removal of Claude Code's 147-Chinese-domain blacklist — a response to the July 6 trust crisis. Same day, CEO Dario Amodei published a Washington Post op-ed stressing 'Anthropic's moat isn't single-model capability — it's safety and enterprise-grade trust.'
articles.source: Anthropic 官方博客 2026-07-08 / 华盛顿邮报 2026-07-08 阿莫迪专栏 / TechCrunch 2026-07-08 / 微博每日 AI 简讯 2026-07-08
articles.source_en: Anthropic Official Blog 2026-07-08 / Washington Post 2026-07-08 Amodei column / TechCrunch 2026-07-08 / Weibo Daily AI Brief 2026-07-08
articles.content: Anthropic 的三步反击是过去 24 个月里其面对的最紧迫 30 天窗口期。三步动作的战术意义分层：Claude Fable 5 Mini 加回 Pro 套餐——直接止血用户流失，避免 GPT-5.6 Terra / Luna 与 DeepSeek V4 抢走 Claude Pro 中间价位用户；Mythos 6 提前到 8 月上旬——把注意力窗口从 Gemini 3.5 Pro（7 月 17 日）与 DeepSeek V4（7 月 16 日）之后，转到 Anthropic 自己的 8 月发布节点；147 域名黑名单下架——回应信任危机，为企业客户留下继续付费的理由。阿莫迪专栏「安全与企业级信任是护城河」的表态——是 Anthropic 战略层面的重新定位——放弃「模型能力全维度领先」的追求，转向「企业级信任与合规」这一差异化定位。这份定位如果坚持下去，Anthropic 的目标客户会从「个人开发者 + 中小团队」进一步向「大企业 + 政府机构」倾斜。反击有效性要看 3 个数据：其一，7 月 7-14 日 Claude Pro 净流失能否从预估的 15-20% 收窄到 8% 以下；其二，Mythos 6 发布后 30 天的 API 使用量能否重回 GPT-5.6 发布前的水平；其三，Anthropic 8 月宣布的企业客户数量是否超过 Q1 2026 的水平。
articles.content_en: Anthropic's three-step counterattack marks the most urgent 30-day window in the past 24 months. The three moves stack tactically: Restoring Claude Fable 5 Mini to Pro / Team stops user bleeding, blocking GPT-5.6 Terra / Luna and DeepSeek V4 from snatching mid-tier Claude Pro users; Mythos 6 pulled forward to early August shifts attention from Gemini 3.5 Pro (July 17) and DeepSeek V4 (July 16) to Anthropic's own August launch; removing the 147-domain blacklist responds to the trust crisis, giving enterprise customers reason to keep paying. Amodei's Washington Post op-ed on 'safety and enterprise trust as moat' is a strategic repositioning — abandoning the pursuit of all-dimensional capability leadership, pivoting to 'enterprise trust and compliance' as differentiation. If this positioning holds, Anthropic's target customer will shift further from 'individual developers + SMBs' toward 'large enterprise + government.' Effectiveness will be gauged by three data points: (1) whether Claude Pro net attrition July 7-14 narrows from estimated 15-20% to below 8%; (2) whether Mythos 6's post-launch 30-day API usage returns to pre-GPT-5.6 levels; (3) whether Anthropic's August enterprise-customer count exceeds Q1 2026 levels.
key_points: Claude Fable 5 Mini 重新加回 Pro / Team 订阅套餐
Claude Mythos 6 预告 8 月上旬发布（提前于原 Q3 后期）
紧急下架 Claude Code 147 中国域名黑名单功能
阿莫迪《华盛顿邮报》专栏：安全与企业信任是护城河
反击有效性看 Claude Pro 净流失、Mythos 6 API 使用量、企业客户数三项数据
key_points_en: Claude Fable 5 Mini restored to Pro / Team plans
Claude Mythos 6 pre-announced for early August (ahead of late Q3)
Urgent removal of Claude Code 147-Chinese-domain blacklist
Amodei Washington Post column: safety and enterprise trust are the moat
Effectiveness gauged by Claude Pro attrition, Mythos 6 API usage, enterprise customer count

hero.title: AI 电力霸权：数据中心撞穿电网天花板，AI 与国民电力的争夺战全面开启
hero.title_en: The AI Power Hegemony: Data Centers Punch Through the Grid Ceiling as the AI-vs-Citizen Electricity Battle Ignites
hero.summary: 2026 年 7 月 11~12 日，AI 产业的第六次结构性拐点浮出水面——「电力」。同日爆出四份关键数据：xAI Memphis 二期 800MW 数据中心提前投运但触发田纳西电网 6 月三次紧急减载、爱尔兰环保署宣布暂停新数据中心批准至 2027 Q2、弗吉尼亚州通过 HB-2401 法案取消数据中心 20 年税收减免、日本关西电力发布全球第一份「AI 专用工业电价」上调 19.5%。四份数据合流指向一个共识——AI 产业进入「算力→电力→电网→国民电价」四层传导阶段，AI 与普通居民、传统制造业争夺电力资源的公开摊牌已经开始。
hero.summary_en: On July 11–12, 2026, the AI industry's sixth structural inflection surfaced—power. Four datasets converged on the same day: xAI's Memphis Phase-II 800MW data center went live ahead of schedule but triggered three emergency load-shedding events on the Tennessee grid in June alone; Ireland's EPA suspended new data center approvals until Q2 2027; Virginia passed HB-2401 revoking the 20-year tax abatement for data centers; and Kansai Electric Power in Japan launched the world's first 'AI Industrial Electricity Tariff' with a 19.5% surcharge. Together they mark the entry of a four-layer transmission—compute → power → grid → residential tariff—and the public showdown between AI and ordinary citizens/traditional industry for electricity has begun.
